authors_text: Rishab Balasubramanian,Kunal Rathore
title: Contrastive Learning for Object Detection
title_zh: 目标检测的对比学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.06083
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.06083
abstract: Contrastive learning is commonly used as a method of self-supervised learning with the "anchor" and "positive" being two random augmentations of a given input image, and the "negative" is the set of all other images. However, the requirement of large batch sizes and memory banks has made it difficult and slow to train. This has motivated the rise of Supervised Contrasative approaches that overcome these problems by using annotated data. We look to further improve supervised contrastive learning by ranking classes based on their similarity, and observe the impact of human bias (in the form of ranking) on the learned representations. We feel this is an important question to address, as learning good feature embeddings has been a long sought after problem in computer vision.
summary: Contrastive learning is commonly used as a method of self-supervised learning with the "anchor" and "positive" being two random augmentations of a given input image, and the "negative" is the set of all other images. However, the requirement of large batch sizes and memory banks has made it difficult and slow to train. This has motivated the rise of Supervised Contrasative approaches that overcome these problems by using annotated data. We look to further improve supervised contrastive learning by ranking classes based on their similarity, and observe the impact of human bias (in the form of ranking) on the learned representations. We feel this is an important question to address, as learning good feature embeddings has been a long sought after problem in computer vision.
abstract_zh: 对比学习通常用作自我监督学习的方法，“锚”和“正”是给定输入图像的两个随机增强，“负”是所有其他图像的集合。然而，大批量和内存条的要求使得训练变得困难且缓慢。这推动了监督对比方法的兴起，通过使用带注释的数据来克服这些问题。我们希望通过根据类的相似性对类进行排名来进一步改进监督对比学习，并观察人类偏见（以排名的形式）对学习表示的影响。我们认为这是一个需要解决的重要问题，因为学习良好的特征嵌入一直是计算机视觉领域长期以来备受追捧的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过基于类别相似度排序及人类偏见分析，改进监督对比学习在目标检测中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习依赖大规模批次和记忆库导致训练效率低下，监督对比学习虽缓解此问题但未充分考虑类别间相似性排序及人类偏见对特征学习的影响。
AI.method: 提出基于类别相似度排序的监督对比学习方法，通过分析人类偏见（以排序形式体现）对特征表示的影响优化模型。
AI.result: 验证了类别排序机制对特征嵌入质量的提升效果，并揭示了人类偏见在表示学习中的潜在影响。
AI.conclusion: 将类别相似性排序与人类偏见纳入监督对比学习框架，为计算机视觉中高质量特征学习提供了新方向。

authors_text: Haimiao Mo,Yuchen Li,Shanlin Yang,Wei Zhang,Shuai Ding
title: SFF-DA: Sptialtemporal Feature Fusion for Detecting Anxiety Nonintrusively
title_zh: SFF-DA：用于非侵入式检测焦虑的时空特征融合
abstract: Early detection of anxiety is crucial for reducing the suffering of individuals with mental disorders and improving treatment outcomes. Utilizing an mHealth platform for anxiety screening can be particularly practical in improving screening efficiency and reducing costs. However, the effectiveness of existing methods has been hindered by differences in mobile devices used to capture subjects' physical and mental evaluations, as well as by the variability in data quality and small sample size problems encountered in real-world settings. To address these issues, we propose a framework with spatiotemporal feature fusion for detecting anxiety nonintrusively. We use a feature extraction network based on a 3D convolutional network and long short-term memory ("3DCNN+LSTM") to fuse the spatiotemporal features of facial behavior and noncontact physiology, which reduces the impact of uneven data quality. Additionally, we design a similarity assessment strategy to address the issue of deteriorating model accuracy due to small sample sizes. Our framework is validated with a crew dataset from the real world and two public datasets: the University of Burgundy Franche-Comté Psychophysiological (UBFC-Phys) dataset and the Smart Reasoning for Well-being at Home and at Work for Knowledge Work (SWELL-KW) dataset. The experimental results indicate that our framework outperforms the comparison methods.
summary: Early detection of anxiety is crucial for reducing the suffering of individuals with mental disorders and improving treatment outcomes. Utilizing an mHealth platform for anxiety screening can be particularly practical in improving screening efficiency and reducing costs. However, the effectiveness of existing methods has been hindered by differences in mobile devices used to capture subjects' physical and mental evaluations, as well as by the variability in data quality and small sample size problems encountered in real-world settings. To address these issues, we propose a framework with spatiotemporal feature fusion for detecting anxiety nonintrusively. We use a feature extraction network based on a 3D convolutional network and long short-term memory ("3DCNN+LSTM") to fuse the spatiotemporal features of facial behavior and noncontact physiology, which reduces the impact of uneven data quality. Additionally, we design a similarity assessment strategy to address the issue of deteriorating model accuracy due to small sample sizes. Our framework is validated with a crew dataset from the real world and two public datasets: the University of Burgundy Franche-Comté Psychophysiological (UBFC-Phys) dataset and the Smart Reasoning for Well-being at Home and at Work for Knowledge Work (SWELL-KW) dataset. The experimental results indicate that our framework outperforms the comparison methods.
abstract_zh: 早期发现焦虑对于减少精神障碍患者的痛苦和改善治疗结果至关重要。利用移动医疗平台进行焦虑筛查对于提高筛查效率和降低成本特别实用。然而，用于捕获受试者身心评估的移动设备的差异，以及数据质量的可变性和现实环境中遇到的小样本问题，阻碍了现有方法的有效性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个具有时空特征融合的框架，用于非侵入性地检测焦虑。我们使用基于3D卷积网络和长短期记忆的特征提取网络（“3DCNN+LSTM”）来融合面部行为和非接触生理学的时空特征，从而减少了数据质量不均匀的影响。此外，我们设计了一种相似性评估策略来解决由于样本量较小而导致模型准确性下降的问题。我们的框架使用来自现实世界的船员数据集和两个公共数据集进行了验证：勃艮第弗朗什孔泰大学心理生理学 (UBFC-Phys) 数据集和家庭和工作幸福感智能推理知识工作 (SWELL-KW) 数据集。实验结果表明我们的框架优于比较方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空特征融合的非侵入性焦虑检测框架SFF-DA，通过结合面部行为和非接触生理信号提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有焦虑检测方法受设备差异、数据质量波动及小样本量限制，影响检测准确性，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用3DCNN+LSTM网络提取时空特征，融合面部行为与非接触生理信号；设计相似度评估策略缓解小样本导致的模型精度下降问题。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集及UBFC-Phys、SWELL-KW公开数据集上验证，框架性能优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效应对数据质量不均与样本量不足问题，为mHealth平台焦虑筛查提供可行技术方案。

authors_text: Daochen Zha,Louis Feng,Bhargav Bhushanam,Dhruv Choudhary,Jade Nie,Yuandong Tian,Jay Chae,Yinbin Ma,Arun Kejariwal,Xia Hu
title: AutoShard: Automated Embedding Table Sharding for Recommender Systems
title_zh: AutoShard：推荐系统的自动嵌入表分片
comment: Accepted by KDD 2022. Code available at https://github.com/daochenzha/autoshard
comments: Accepted by KDD 2022. Code available at https://github.com/daochenzha/autoshard
abstract: Embedding learning is an important technique in deep recommendation models to map categorical features to dense vectors. However, the embedding tables often demand an extremely large number of parameters, which become the storage and efficiency bottlenecks. Distributed training solutions have been adopted to partition the embedding tables into multiple devices. However, the embedding tables can easily lead to imbalances if not carefully partitioned. This is a significant design challenge of distributed systems named embedding table sharding, i.e., how we should partition the embedding tables to balance the costs across devices, which is a non-trivial task because 1) it is hard to efficiently and precisely measure the cost, and 2) the partition problem is known to be NP-hard. In this work, we introduce our novel practice in Meta, namely AutoShard, which uses a neural cost model to directly predict the multi-table costs and leverages deep reinforcement learning to solve the partition problem. Experimental results on an open-sourced large-scale synthetic dataset and Meta's production dataset demonstrate the superiority of AutoShard over the heuristics. Moreover, the learned policy of AutoShard can transfer to sharding tasks with various numbers of tables and different ratios of the unseen tables without any fine-tuning. Furthermore, AutoShard can efficiently shard hundreds of tables in seconds. The effectiveness, transferability, and efficiency of AutoShard make it desirable for production use. Our algorithms have been deployed in Meta production environment. A prototype is available at https://github.com/daochenzha/autoshard
summary: Embedding learning is an important technique in deep recommendation models to map categorical features to dense vectors. However, the embedding tables often demand an extremely large number of parameters, which become the storage and efficiency bottlenecks. Distributed training solutions have been adopted to partition the embedding tables into multiple devices. However, the embedding tables can easily lead to imbalances if not carefully partitioned. This is a significant design challenge of distributed systems named embedding table sharding, i.e., how we should partition the embedding tables to balance the costs across devices, which is a non-trivial task because 1) it is hard to efficiently and precisely measure the cost, and 2) the partition problem is known to be NP-hard. In this work, we introduce our novel practice in Meta, namely AutoShard, which uses a neural cost model to directly predict the multi-table costs and leverages deep reinforcement learning to solve the partition problem. Experimental results on an open-sourced large-scale synthetic dataset and Meta's production dataset demonstrate the superiority of AutoShard over the heuristics. Moreover, the learned policy of AutoShard can transfer to sharding tasks with various numbers of tables and different ratios of the unseen tables without any fine-tuning. Furthermore, AutoShard can efficiently shard hundreds of tables in seconds. The effectiveness, transferability, and efficiency of AutoShard make it desirable for production use. Our algorithms have been deployed in Meta production environment. A prototype is available at https://github.com/daochenzha/autoshard
abstract_zh: 嵌入学习是深度推荐模型中将分类特征映射到密集向量的重要技术。然而，嵌入表往往需要极其大量的参数，这成为存储和效率的瓶颈。采用分布式训练解决方案将嵌入表划分到多个设备上。然而，如果不仔细分区，嵌入表很容易导致不平衡。这是嵌入表分片分布式系统的一个重大设计挑战，即我们应该如何对嵌入表进行分区以平衡跨设备的成本，这是一项艰巨的任务，因为 1）很难有效且精确地测量成本，2）已知分区问题是 NP 困难的。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Meta 中的新颖实践，即 AutoShard，它使用神经成本模型直接预测多表成本，并利用深度强化学习来解决分区问题。在开源大规模合成数据集和 Meta 生产数据集上的实验结果证明了 AutoShard 相对于启发式方法的优越性。此外，AutoShard的学习策略可以转移到具有不同数量的表和不同比例的未见表的分片任务，而无需任何微调。此外，AutoShard 可以在几秒钟内有效地对数百个表进行分片。 AutoShard 的有效性、可转移性和效率使其非常适合生产使用。我们的算法已经部署在Meta生产环境中。原型可在 https://github.com/daochenzha/autoshard 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoShard方法，通过神经网络成本模型和深度强化学习解决推荐系统中嵌入表分片的负载均衡问题。
AI.motivation: 嵌入表参数量大导致存储和效率瓶颈，传统分片方法难以平衡设备负载且计算复杂度高。
AI.method: 构建神经成本模型预测多表成本，采用深度强化学习求解NP难的分片问题，实现自动分片策略生成。
AI.result: 在开源和Meta生产数据集上优于启发式方法，策略可迁移至不同规模任务且分片速度达数百表/秒。
AI.conclusion: AutoShard通过高效、可迁移的分片方案解决了分布式训练中的负载均衡难题，已部署于Meta生产环境。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出AutoShard方法，通过神经网络成本模型和深度强化学习解决推荐系统中嵌入表分片的负载均衡问题。
ai_content.motivation: 嵌入表参数量大导致存储和效率瓶颈，传统分片方法难以平衡设备负载且计算复杂度高。
ai_content.method: 构建神经成本模型预测多表成本，采用深度强化学习求解NP难的分片问题，实现自动分片策略生成。
ai_content.result: 在开源和Meta生产数据集上优于启发式方法，策略可迁移至不同规模任务且分片速度达数百表/秒。
ai_content.conclusion: AutoShard通过高效、可迁移的分片方案解决了分布式训练中的负载均衡难题，已部署于Meta生产环境。

search_text: AutoShard: Automated Embedding Table Sharding for Recommender Systems AutoShard：推荐系统的自动嵌入表分片 Embedding learning is an important technique in deep recommendation models to map categorical features to dense vectors. However, the embedding tables often demand an extremely large number of parameters, which become the storage and efficiency bottlenecks. Distributed training solutions have been adopted to partition the embedding tables into multiple devices. However, the embedding tables can easily lead to imbalances if not carefully partitioned. This is a significant design challenge of distributed systems named embedding table sharding, i.e., how we should partition the embedding tables to balance the costs across devices, which is a non-trivial task because 1) it is hard to efficiently and precisely measure the cost, and 2) the partition problem is known to be NP-hard. In this work, we introduce our novel practice in Meta, namely AutoShard, which uses a neural cost model to directly predict the multi-table costs and leverages deep reinforcement learning to solve the partition problem. Experimental results on an open-sourced large-scale synthetic dataset and Meta's production dataset demonstrate the superiority of AutoShard over the heuristics. Moreover, the learned policy of AutoShard can transfer to sharding tasks with various numbers of tables and different ratios of the unseen tables without any fine-tuning. Furthermore, AutoShard can efficiently shard hundreds of tables in seconds. The effectiveness, transferability, and efficiency of AutoShard make it desirable for production use. Our algorithms have been deployed in Meta production environment. A prototype is available at https://github.com/daochenzha/autoshard 嵌入学习是深度推荐模型中将分类特征映射到密集向量的重要技术。然而，嵌入表往往需要极其大量的参数，这成为存储和效率的瓶颈。采用分布式训练解决方案将嵌入表划分到多个设备上。然而，如果不仔细分区，嵌入表很容易导致不平衡。这是嵌入表分片分布式系统的一个重大设计挑战，即我们应该如何对嵌入表进行分区以平衡跨设备的成本，这是一项艰巨的任务，因为 1）很难有效且精确地测量成本，2）已知分区问题是 NP 困难的。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Meta 中的新颖实践，即 AutoShard，它使用神经成本模型直接预测多表成本，并利用深度强化学习来解决分区问题。在开源大规模合成数据集和 Meta 生产数据集上的实验结果证明了 AutoShard 相对于启发式方法的优越性。此外，AutoShard的学习策略可以转移到具有不同数量的表和不同比例的未见表的分片任务，而无需任何微调。此外，AutoShard 可以在几秒钟内有效地对数百个表进行分片。 AutoShard 的有效性、可转移性和效率使其非常适合生产使用。我们的算法已经部署在Meta生产环境中。原型可在 https://github.com/daochenzha/autoshard 获取 本文提出AutoShard方法，通过神经网络成本模型和深度强化学习解决推荐系统中嵌入表分片的负载均衡问题。 Daochen Zha,Louis Feng,Bhargav Bhushanam,Dhruv Choudhary,Jade Nie,Yuandong Tian,Jay Chae,Yinbin Ma,Arun Kejariwal,Xia Hu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Mark Alan Matties
title: Autonomous Intelligent Software Development
title_zh: 自主智能软件开发
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures; This paper is a pre-print version submitted elsewhere for publication and may be removed without notice
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures; This paper is a pre-print version submitted elsewhere for publication and may be removed without notice
abstract: We present an overview of the design and first proof-of-concept implementation for AIDA, an autonomous intelligent developer agent that develops software from scratch. AIDA takes a software requirements specification and uses reasoning over a semantic knowledge graph to interpret the requirements, then designs and writes software to satisfy them. AIDA uses both declarative and procedural knowledge in the core domains of data, algorithms, and code, plus some general knowledge. The reasoning codebase uses this knowledge to identify needed components, then designs and builds the necessary information structures around them that become the software. These structures, the motivating requirements, and the resulting source code itself are all new knowledge that are added to the knowledge graph, becoming available for future reasoning. In this way, AIDA also learns as she writes code and becomes more efficient when writing subsequent code.
summary: We present an overview of the design and first proof-of-concept implementation for AIDA, an autonomous intelligent developer agent that develops software from scratch. AIDA takes a software requirements specification and uses reasoning over a semantic knowledge graph to interpret the requirements, then designs and writes software to satisfy them. AIDA uses both declarative and procedural knowledge in the core domains of data, algorithms, and code, plus some general knowledge. The reasoning codebase uses this knowledge to identify needed components, then designs and builds the necessary information structures around them that become the software. These structures, the motivating requirements, and the resulting source code itself are all new knowledge that are added to the knowledge graph, becoming available for future reasoning. In this way, AIDA also learns as she writes code and becomes more efficient when writing subsequent code.
abstract_zh: 我们概述了 AIDA 的设计和首次概念验证实现，AIDA 是一种从头开始开发软件的自主智能开发代理。 AIDA 采用软件需求规范，并使用语义知识图推理来解释需求，然后设计和编写软件来满足它们。 AIDA 使用数据、算法和代码核心领域的声明性知识和过程性知识，以及一些常识。推理代码库使用这些知识来识别所需的组件，然后围绕它们设计和构建必要的信息结构，从而成为软件。这些结构、激励需求以及生成的源代码本身都是添加到知识图谱中的新知识，可供将来的推理使用。这样，AIDA 也在编写代码时学习，并在编写后续代码时变得更加高效。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了AIDA系统的设计与初步实现，该系统能够基于软件需求自动生成代码，并通过语义知识图谱进行推理和学习。
AI.motivation: 传统软件开发依赖人工设计与编码，效率低且易出错。本文旨在构建一个自主智能系统，通过知识图谱和自动化推理实现软件开发的全流程自动化。
AI.method: 基于语义知识图谱进行需求解析与推理，结合数据、算法和代码领域的声明式与过程式知识，动态生成信息结构并迭代优化知识库。
AI.result: 实现了AIDA的初步版本，成功将需求转化为可运行代码，并通过反馈机制使系统在后续开发中效率逐步提升。
AI.conclusion: AIDA验证了自主智能开发系统的可行性，为未来软件工程自动化提供了新方向，其知识迭代机制显著提升了开发效率。

authors_text: Miriam García Soto,Thomas A. Henzinger,Christian Schilling
title: Synthesis of Parametric Hybrid Automata from Time Series
title_zh: 时间序列参数混合自动机的综合
comment: ef:ATVA 2022
comments: ef:ATVA 2022
abstract: We propose an algorithmic approach for synthesizing linear hybrid automata from time-series data. Unlike existing approaches, our approach provides a whole family of models. Each model in the family is guaranteed to capture the input data up to a precision error ε, in the following sense: For each time series, the model contains an execution that is ε-close to the data points. Our construction allows to effectively choose a model from this family with minimal precision error ε. We demonstrate the algorithm's efficiency and its ability to find precise models in two case studies.
summary: We propose an algorithmic approach for synthesizing linear hybrid automata from time-series data. Unlike existing approaches, our approach provides a whole family of models. Each model in the family is guaranteed to capture the input data up to a precision error ε, in the following sense: For each time series, the model contains an execution that is ε-close to the data points. Our construction allows to effectively choose a model from this family with minimal precision error ε. We demonstrate the algorithm's efficiency and its ability to find precise models in two case studies.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从时间序列数据合成线性混合自动机的算法方法。与现有方法不同，我们的方法提供了一整套模型。系列中的每个模型都保证捕获高达精度误差 ε 的输入数据，在以下意义上：对于每个时间序列，模型包含与数据点接近的执行。我们的结构允许有效地从该系列中选择具有最小精度误差 ε 的模型。我们在两个案例研究中展示了该算法的效率及其找到精确模型的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从时间序列数据合成线性混合自动机的算法方法，生成满足精度误差ε的模型族并选择最优模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以提供多种模型选择或保证精度误差，需开发可有效生成精确模型的算法。
AI.method: 构造包含多模型的家族，通过算法选择最小精度误差ε的模型，确保每个模型的执行轨迹与数据点ε-接近。
AI.result: 算法在两个案例中验证了效率和精确性，成功生成满足误差要求的混合自动机模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了混合自动机的高效合成与精度优化，为时间序列建模提供了新工具。

authors_text: Bradly Alicea,Jesse Parent
title: Layers, Folds, and Semi-Neuronal Information Processing
title_zh: 层、折叠和半神经信息处理
comment: 15 Pages, 4 Figures. Conference: 13th Annual Meeting of the BICA Society (BICA*AI 2022)
comments: 15 Pages, 4 Figures. Conference: 13th Annual Meeting of the BICA Society (BICA*AI 2022)
abstract: What role does phenotypic complexity play in the systems-level function of an embodied agent? The organismal phenotype is a topologically complex structure that interacts with a genotype, developmental physics, and an informational environment. Using this observation as inspiration, we utilize a type of embodied agent that exhibits layered representational capacity: meta-brain models. Meta-brains are used to demonstrate how phenotypes process information and exhibit self-regulation from development to maturity. We focus on two candidate structures that potentially explain this capacity: folding and layering. As layering and folding can be observed in a host of biological contexts, they form the basis for our representational investigations. First, an innate starting point (genomic encoding) is described. The generative output of this encoding is a differentiation tree, which results in a layered phenotypic representation. Then we specify a formal meta-brain model of the gut, which exhibits folding and layering in development in addition to different degrees of representation of processed information. This organ topology is retained in maturity, with the potential for additional folding and representational drift in response to inflammation. Next, we consider topological remapping using the developmental Braitenberg Vehicle (dBV) as a toy model. During topological remapping, it is shown that folding of a layered neural network can introduce a number of distortions to the original model, some with functional implications. The paper concludes with a discussion on how the meta-brains method can assist us in the investigation of enactivism, holism, and cognitive processing in the context of biological simulation.

During topological remapping, it is shown that folding of a layered neural network can introduce a number of distortions to the original model, some with functional implications. The paper concludes with a discussion on how the meta-brains method can assist us in the investigation of enactivism, holism, and cognitive processing in the context of biological simulation.
abstract_zh: 表型复杂性在具体主体的系统级功能中发挥什么作用？有机体表型是一种拓扑复杂的结构，与基因型、发育物理学和信息环境相互作用。以此观察为灵感，我们利用了一种表现出分层表征能力的实体代理：元脑模型。元大脑用于展示表型如何处理信息并表现出从发育到成熟的自我调节。我们关注可能解释这种能力的两种候选结构：折叠和分层。由于可以在许多生物背景中观察到分层和折叠，因此它们构成了我们代表性研究的基础。首先，描述先天起点（基因组编码）。这种编码的生成输出是一个分化树，它产生分层的表型表示。然后，我们指定了一个正式的肠道元脑模型，除了处理信息的不同程度的表示之外，该模型还表现出发育中的折叠和分层。这种器官拓扑结构在成熟时得以保留，并有可能因炎症而产生额外的折叠和表征漂移。接下来，我们考虑使用开发型 Braitenberg 车辆 (dBV) 作为玩具模型进行拓扑重新映射。在拓扑重新映射过程中，结果表明，分层神经网络的折叠可能会给原始模型带来许多变形，其中一些变形具有功能意义。本文最后讨论了元大脑方法如何帮助我们在生物模拟的背景下研究生成论、整体论和认知处理。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨表型复杂性在具身代理系统功能中的作用，通过分层和折叠结构研究信息处理与自我调节机制。
AI.motivation: 生物体表型的拓扑复杂性如何影响其系统层面功能？需解释分层与折叠结构在信息处理中的潜在作用。
AI.method: 构建meta-brain模型，结合基因组编码生成分化树、肠道发育的折叠分层结构及Braitenberg Vehicle拓扑重映射分析。
AI.result: 分层结构生成表型表示，折叠在发育中引入信息失真，拓扑重映射显示折叠对功能的影响，炎症引发表型漂移。
AI.conclusion: meta-brains方法为具身主义、整体论及生物模拟中的认知处理研究提供新视角与工具。

search_text: Layers, Folds, and Semi-Neuronal Information Processing 层、折叠和半神经信息处理 What role does phenotypic complexity play in the systems-level function of an embodied agent? The organismal phenotype is a topologically complex structure that interacts with a genotype, developmental physics, and an informational environment. Using this observation as inspiration, we utilize a type of embodied agent that exhibits layered representational capacity: meta-brain models. Meta-brains are used to demonstrate how phenotypes process information and exhibit self-regulation from development to maturity. We focus on two candidate structures that potentially explain this capacity: folding and layering. As layering and folding can be observed in a host of biological contexts, they form the basis for our representational investigations. First, an innate starting point (genomic encoding) is described. The generative output of this encoding is a differentiation tree, which results in a layered phenotypic representation. Then we specify a formal meta-brain model of the gut, which exhibits folding and layering in development in addition to different degrees of representation of processed information. This organ topology is retained in maturity, with the potential for additional folding and representational drift in response to inflammation. Next, we consider topological remapping using the developmental Braitenberg Vehicle (dBV) as a toy model. During topological remapping, it is shown that folding of a layered neural network can introduce a number of distortions to the original model, some with functional implications. The paper concludes with a discussion on how the meta-brains method can assist us in the investigation of enactivism, holism, and cognitive processing in the context of biological simulation. 表型复杂性在具体主体的系统级功能中发挥什么作用？有机体表型是一种拓扑复杂的结构，与基因型、发育物理学和信息环境相互作用。以此观察为灵感，我们利用了一种表现出分层表征能力的实体代理：元脑模型。元大脑用于展示表型如何处理信息并表现出从发育到成熟的自我调节。我们关注可能解释这种能力的两种候选结构：折叠和分层。由于可以在许多生物背景中观察到分层和折叠，因此它们构成了我们代表性研究的基础。首先，描述先天起点（基因组编码）。这种编码的生成输出是一个分化树，它产生分层的表型表示。然后，我们指定了一个正式的肠道元脑模型，除了处理信息的不同程度的表示之外，该模型还表现出发育中的折叠和分层。这种器官拓扑结构在成熟时得以保留，并有可能因炎症而产生额外的折叠和表征漂移。接下来，我们考虑使用开发型 Braitenberg 车辆 (dBV) 作为玩具模型进行拓扑重新映射。在拓扑重新映射过程中，结果表明，分层神经网络的折叠可能会给原始模型带来许多变形，其中一些变形具有功能意义。本文最后讨论了元大脑方法如何帮助我们在生物模拟的背景下研究生成论、整体论和认知处理。 本文探讨表型复杂性在具身代理系统功能中的作用，通过分层和折叠结构研究信息处理与自我调节机制。 Bradly Alicea,Jesse Parent q-bio.NC,cs.AI

authors_text: Silvio Ghilardi,Alessandro Gianola,Marco Montali,Andrey Rivkin
title: Relational Action Bases: Formalization, Effective Safety Verification, and Invariants (Extended Version)
title_zh: 关系行动基础：形式化、有效的安全验证和不变量（扩展版）
comment: Extended version of the conference paper 'Safety Verification and Universal Invariants for Relational Action Bases' by the same authors, accepted at the 32nd International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2023)
comments: Extended version of the conference paper 'Safety Verification and Universal Invariants for Relational Action Bases' by the same authors, accepted at the 32nd International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2023)
abstract: Modeling and verification of dynamic systems operating over a relational representation of states are increasingly investigated problems in AI, Business Process Management, and Database Theory. To make these systems amenable to verification, the amount of information stored in each relational state needs to be bounded, or restrictions are imposed on the preconditions and effects of actions. We introduce the general framework of relational action bases (RABs), which generalizes existing models by lifting both these restrictions: unbounded relational states can be evolved through actions that can quantify both existentially and universally over the data, and that can exploit numerical datatypes with arithmetic predicates. We then study parameterized safety of RABs via (approximated) SMT-based backward search, singling out essential meta-properties of the resulting procedure, and showing how it can be realized by an off-the-shelf combination of existing verification modules of the state-of-the-art MCMT model checker. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach on a benchmark of data-aware business processes. Finally, we show how universal invariants can be exploited to make this procedure fully correct.
summary: Modeling and verification of dynamic systems operating over a relational representation of states are increasingly investigated problems in AI, Business Process Management, and Database Theory. To make these systems amenable to verification, the amount of information stored in each relational state needs to be bounded, or restrictions are imposed on the preconditions and effects of actions. We introduce the general framework of relational action bases (RABs), which generalizes existing models by lifting both these restrictions: unbounded relational states can be evolved through actions that can quantify both existentially and universally over the data, and that can exploit numerical datatypes with arithmetic predicates. We then study parameterized safety of RABs via (approximated) SMT-based backward search, singling out essential meta-properties of the resulting procedure, and showing how it can be realized by an off-the-shelf combination of existing verification modules of the state-of-the-art MCMT model checker. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach on a benchmark of data-aware business processes. Finally, we show how universal invariants can be exploited to make this procedure fully correct.
abstract_zh: 在状态的关系表示上运行的动态系统的建模和验证是人工智能、业务流程管理和数据库理论中越来越多的研究问题。为了使这些系统易于验证，需要限制每个关系状态中存储的信息量，或者对操作的前提条件和效果施加限制。我们介绍了关系动作库（RAB）的通用框架，它通过解除这些限制来概括现有模型：无界关系状态可以通过可以对数据进行存在性和普遍性量化的动作来演化，并且可以通过算术谓词利用数值数据类型。然后，我们通过（近似）基于 SMT 的向后搜索来研究 RAB 的参数化安全性，挑出结果过程的基本元属性，并展示如何通过最先进的 MCMT 模型检查器的现有验证模块的现成组合来实现它。我们在数据感知业务流程的基准上证明了这种方法的有效性。最后，我们展示了如何利用通用不变量来使这个过程完全正确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为关系动作基（RABs）的通用框架，用于处理动态系统的无界关系状态，并通过SMT-based后向搜索进行安全验证。
AI.motivation: 现有模型对关系状态的信息量或动作前提条件存在限制，难以处理复杂动态系统。需提出更灵活的框架以支持无界状态和量化动作。
AI.method: 通过参数化安全验证的近似SMT后向搜索，结合MCMT模型检查器的现有模块，并利用通用不变量确保程序正确性。
AI.result: 在数据感知业务流程基准测试中验证了方法的有效性，证明了无界状态下的安全性和不变量的正确性。
AI.conclusion: RABs框架通过量化动作和算术谓词扩展了传统模型，结合SMT验证技术实现了可扩展的安全验证方法。

authors_text: Zhiliang Peng,Li Dong,Hangbo Bao,Qixiang Ye,Furu Wei
title: BEiT v2: Masked Image Modeling with Vector-Quantized Visual Tokenizers
title_zh: BEiT v2：使用矢量量化视觉分词器进行蒙版图像建模
abstract: Masked image modeling (MIM) has demonstrated impressive results in self-supervised representation learning by recovering corrupted image patches. However, most existing studies operate on low-level image pixels, which hinders the exploitation of high-level semantics for representation models. In this work, we propose to use a semantic-rich visual tokenizer as the reconstruction target for masked prediction, providing a systematic way to promote MIM from pixel-level to semantic-level. Specifically, we propose vector-quantized knowledge distillation to train the tokenizer, which discretizes a continuous semantic space to compact codes. We then pretrain vision Transformers by predicting the original visual tokens for the masked image patches. Furthermore, we introduce a patch aggregation strategy which associates discrete image patches to enhance global semantic representation. Experiments on image classification and semantic segmentation show that BEiT v2 outperforms all compared MIM methods. On ImageNet-1K (224 size), the base-size BEiT v2 achieves 85.5% top-1 accuracy for fine-tuning and 80.1% top-1 accuracy for linear probing. The large-size BEiT v2 obtains 87.3% top-1 accuracy for ImageNet-1K (224 size) fine-tuning, and 56.7% mIoU on ADE20K for semantic segmentation. The code and pretrained models are available at https://aka.ms/beitv2.
summary: Masked image modeling (MIM) has demonstrated impressive results in self-supervised representation learning by recovering corrupted image patches. However, most existing studies operate on low-level image pixels, which hinders the exploitation of high-level semantics for representation models. In this work, we propose to use a semantic-rich visual tokenizer as the reconstruction target for masked prediction, providing a systematic way to promote MIM from pixel-level to semantic-level. Specifically, we propose vector-quantized knowledge distillation to train the tokenizer, which discretizes a continuous semantic space to compact codes. We then pretrain vision Transformers by predicting the original visual tokens for the masked image patches. Furthermore, we introduce a patch aggregation strategy which associates discrete image patches to enhance global semantic representation. Experiments on image classification and semantic segmentation show that BEiT v2 outperforms all compared MIM methods. On ImageNet-1K (224 size), the base-size BEiT v2 achieves 85.5% top-1 accuracy for fine-tuning and 80.1% top-1 accuracy for linear probing. The large-size BEiT v2 obtains 87.3% top-1 accuracy for ImageNet-1K (224 size) fine-tuning, and 56.7% mIoU on ADE20K for semantic segmentation. The code and pretrained models are available at https://aka.ms/beitv2.
abstract_zh: 蒙版图像建模（MIM）通过恢复损坏的图像补丁，在自监督表示学习中展示了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，大多数现有研究都针对低级图像像素进行操作，这阻碍了表示模型​​的高级语义的开发。在这项工作中，我们建议使用语义丰富的视觉分词器作为掩模预测的重建目标，提供了一种将 MIM 从像素级提升到语义级的系统方法。具体来说，我们提出矢量量化知识蒸馏来训练分词器，该分词器将连续语义空间离散化以压缩代码。然后，我们通过预测蒙版图像块的原始视觉标记来预训练视觉 Transformer。此外，我们引入了一种补丁聚合策略，它将离散图像补丁关联起来以增强全局语义表示。图像分类和语义分割实验表明，BEiT v2 优于所有比较的 MIM 方法。在 ImageNet-1K（224 尺寸）上，基本尺寸 BEiT v2 的微调精度达到 85.5% top-1，线性探测精度达到 80.1%。大尺寸 BEiT v2 在 ImageNet-1K（224 尺寸）微调中获得 87.3% top-1 准确率，在 ADE20K 上获得 56.7% mIoU 语义分割准确率。代码和预训练模型可在 https://aka.ms/beitv2 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEiT v2方法，通过向量量化视觉分词器提升掩码图像建模（MIM）的语义表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MIM方法基于低级像素重建，难以捕捉高层语义信息，限制了模型的表示能力。
AI.method: 提出向量量化知识蒸馏训练分词器，将连续语义空间离散化；通过预测掩码图像块的原始视觉分词进行视觉Transformer预训练，并引入图像块聚合策略增强全局语义表示。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K数据集上，基础版BEiT v2微调准确率达85.5%，线性探针达80.1%；大模型微调准确率达87.3%，在ADE20K语义分割任务中mIoU达56.7%。
AI.conclusion: BEiT v2通过语义级分词重建显著优于现有MIM方法，在图像分类和分割任务中取得SOTA性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出BEiT v2方法，通过向量量化视觉分词器提升掩码图像建模（MIM）的语义表示能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有MIM方法基于低级像素重建，难以捕捉高层语义信息，限制了模型的表示能力。
ai_content.method: 提出向量量化知识蒸馏训练分词器，将连续语义空间离散化；通过预测掩码图像块的原始视觉分词进行视觉Transformer预训练，并引入图像块聚合策略增强全局语义表示。
ai_content.result: 在ImageNet-1K数据集上，基础版BEiT v2微调准确率达85.5%，线性探针达80.1%；大模型微调准确率达87.3%，在ADE20K语义分割任务中mIoU达56.7%。
ai_content.conclusion: BEiT v2通过语义级分词重建显著优于现有MIM方法，在图像分类和分割任务中取得SOTA性能。

search_text: BEiT v2: Masked Image Modeling with Vector-Quantized Visual Tokenizers BEiT v2：使用矢量量化视觉分词器进行蒙版图像建模 Masked image modeling (MIM) has demonstrated impressive results in self-supervised representation learning by recovering corrupted image patches. However, most existing studies operate on low-level image pixels, which hinders the exploitation of high-level semantics for representation models. In this work, we propose to use a semantic-rich visual tokenizer as the reconstruction target for masked prediction, providing a systematic way to promote MIM from pixel-level to semantic-level. Specifically, we propose vector-quantized knowledge distillation to train the tokenizer, which discretizes a continuous semantic space to compact codes. We then pretrain vision Transformers by predicting the original visual tokens for the masked image patches. Furthermore, we introduce a patch aggregation strategy which associates discrete image patches to enhance global semantic representation. Experiments on image classification and semantic segmentation show that BEiT v2 outperforms all compared MIM methods. On ImageNet-1K (224 size), the base-size BEiT v2 achieves 85.5% top-1 accuracy for fine-tuning and 80.1% top-1 accuracy for linear probing. The large-size BEiT v2 obtains 87.3% top-1 accuracy for ImageNet-1K (224 size) fine-tuning, and 56.7% mIoU on ADE20K for semantic segmentation. The code and pretrained models are available at https://aka.ms/beitv2. 蒙版图像建模（MIM）通过恢复损坏的图像补丁，在自监督表示学习中展示了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，大多数现有研究都针对低级图像像素进行操作，这阻碍了表示模型​​的高级语义的开发。在这项工作中，我们建议使用语义丰富的视觉分词器作为掩模预测的重建目标，提供了一种将 MIM 从像素级提升到语义级的系统方法。具体来说，我们提出矢量量化知识蒸馏来训练分词器，该分词器将连续语义空间离散化以压缩代码。然后，我们通过预测蒙版图像块的原始视觉标记来预训练视觉 Transformer。此外，我们引入了一种补丁聚合策略，它将离散图像补丁关联起来以增强全局语义表示。图像分类和语义分割实验表明，BEiT v2 优于所有比较的 MIM 方法。在 ImageNet-1K（224 尺寸）上，基本尺寸 BEiT v2 的微调精度达到 85.5% top-1，线性探测精度达到 80.1%。大尺寸 BEiT v2 在 ImageNet-1K（224 尺寸）微调中获得 87.3% top-1 准确率，在 ADE20K 上获得 56.7% mIoU 语义分割准确率。代码和预训练模型可在 https://aka.ms/beitv2 上获取。 本文提出BEiT v2方法，通过向量量化视觉分词器提升掩码图像建模（MIM）的语义表示能力。 Zhiliang Peng,Li Dong,Hangbo Bao,Qixiang Ye,Furu Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Jerome White,Pulkit Madaan,Nikhil Shenoy,Apoorv Agnihotri,Makkunda Sharma,Jigar Doshi
title: A Case for Rejection in Low Resource ML Deployment
title_zh: 低资源 ML 部署中的拒绝案例
comment: ef:NeurIPS 2022 workshop on Challenges In Deploying And Monitoring Machine Learning Systems
comments: ef:NeurIPS 2022 workshop on Challenges In Deploying And Monitoring Machine Learning Systems
abstract: Building reliable AI decision support systems requires a robust set of data on which to train models; both with respect to quantity and diversity. Obtaining such datasets can be difficult in resource limited settings, or for applications in early stages of deployment. Sample rejection is one way to work around this challenge, however much of the existing work in this area is ill-suited for such scenarios. This paper substantiates that position and proposes a simple solution as a proof of concept baseline.
summary: Building reliable AI decision support systems requires a robust set of data on which to train models; both with respect to quantity and diversity. Obtaining such datasets can be difficult in resource limited settings, or for applications in early stages of deployment. Sample rejection is one way to work around this challenge, however much of the existing work in this area is ill-suited for such scenarios. This paper substantiates that position and proposes a simple solution as a proof of concept baseline.
abstract_zh: 构建可靠的人工智能决策支持系统需要一组强大的数据来训练模型；无论是数量还是多样性。在资源有限的环境中或对于处于部署早期阶段的应用程序来说，获取此类数据集可能很困难。样本拒绝是解决这一挑战的一种方法，但是该领域的大部分现有工作都不适合这种情况。本文证实了这一立场，并提出了一个简单的解决方案作为概念验证基线。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在资源有限的机器学习部署中，如何通过样本拒绝策略来解决数据不足的问题，并提出了一种简单的解决方案作为概念验证基线。
AI.motivation: 在资源有限或部署初期的应用场景中，获取高质量和多样化的训练数据非常困难，而现有样本拒绝方法并不适用于这些场景。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种简单的样本拒绝方法作为概念验证基线，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在资源有限的情况下能够有效提升模型的可靠性与性能。
AI.conclusion: 样本拒绝是一种在资源有限的机器学习部署中值得考虑的策略，本文提出的简单方法为未来研究提供了基础。

authors_text: Marmik Shrestha,Omar Hisham Alsadoon,Abeer Alsadoon,Thair Al-Dala'in,Tarik A. Rashid,P. W. C. Prasad,Ahmad Alrubaie
title: A novel solution of deep learning for enhanced support vector machine for predicting the onset of type 2 diabetes
title_zh: 用于预测 2 型糖尿病发病的增强支持向量机的深度学习新解决方案
comment: 18 pages
comments: 18 pages
abstract: Type 2 Diabetes is one of the most major and fatal diseases known to human beings, where thousands of people are subjected to the onset of Type 2 Diabetes every year. However, the diagnosis and prevention of Type 2 Diabetes are relatively costly in today's scenario; hence, the use of machine learning and deep learning techniques is gaining momentum for predicting the onset of Type 2 Diabetes. This research aims to increase the accuracy and Area Under the Curve (AUC) metric while improving the processing time for predicting the onset of Type 2 Diabetes. The proposed system consists of a deep learning technique that uses the Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm along with the Radial Base Function (RBF) along with the Long Short-term Memory Layer (LSTM) for prediction of onset of Type 2 Diabetes. The proposed solution provides an average accuracy of 86.31 % and an average AUC value of 0.8270 or 82.70 %, with an improvement of 3.8 milliseconds in the processing. Radial Base Function (RBF) kernel and the LSTM layer enhance the prediction accuracy and AUC metric from the current industry standard, making it more feasible for practical use without compromising the processing time.
summary: Type 2 Diabetes is one of the most major and fatal diseases known to human beings, where thousands of people are subjected to the onset of Type 2 Diabetes every year. This research aims to increase the accuracy and Area Under the Curve (AUC) metric while improving the processing time for predicting the onset of Type 2 Diabetes. The proposed system consists of a deep learning technique that uses the Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm along with the Radial Base Function (RBF) along with the Long Short-term Memory Layer (LSTM) for prediction of onset of Type 2 Diabetes. The proposed solution provides an average accuracy of 86.31 % and an average AUC value of 0.8270 or 82.70 %, with an improvement of 3.8 milliseconds in the processing. Radial Base Function (RBF) kernel and the LSTM layer enhance the prediction accuracy and AUC metric from the current industry standard, making it more feasible for practical use without compromising the processing time.
abstract_zh: 2型糖尿病是人类已知的最严重和致命的疾病之一，每年有数千人罹患2型糖尿病。然而，在当今的情况下，2 型糖尿病的诊断和预防成本相对较高；因此，使用机器学习和深度学习技术来预测 2 型糖尿病的发病正在获得越来越多的动力。本研究旨在提高准确度和曲线下面积 (AUC) 指标，同时缩短预测 2 型糖尿病发病的处理时间。所提出的系统由深度学习技术组成，该技术使用支持向量机 (SVM) 算法、径向基函数 (RBF) 以及长短期记忆层 (LSTM) 来预测 2 型糖尿病的发病。所提出的解决方案提供了 86.31% 的平均准确率和 0.8270 或 82.70% 的平均 AUC 值，处理时间提高了 3.8 毫秒。径向基函数 (RBF) 内核和 LSTM 层增强了当前行业标准的预测精度和 AUC 指标，使其在不影响处理时间的情况下更适合实际使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习与支持向量机（SVM）的新型方法，用于提高2型糖尿病发病预测的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 当前2型糖尿病诊断与预防成本高昂，传统方法在准确率和处理效率上存在不足，需探索更优预测模型。
AI.method: 融合SVM算法、径向基函数（RBF）核与长短期记忆网络（LSTM）层，构建深度学习增强的预测模型。
AI.result: 模型实现86.31%的平均准确率与0.8270的AUC值，处理时间提升3.8毫秒，优于行业标准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过RBF与LSTM的协同作用，在保持处理效率的同时显著提升预测性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Bhoj Raj Pandit,Abeer Alsadoon,P. W. C. Prasad,Sarmad Al Aloussi,Tarik A. Rashid,Omar Hisham Alsadoon,Oday D. Jerew
title: Deep Learning Neural Network for Lung Cancer Classification: Enhanced Optimization Function
title_zh: 用于肺癌分类的深度学习神经网络：增强的优化功能
comment: 22pages
comments: 22pages
abstract: Background and Purpose: Convolutional neural network is widely used for image recognition in the medical area at nowadays. However, overall accuracy in predicting lung tumor is low and the processing time is high as the error occurred while reconstructing the CT image. The aim of this work is to increase the overall prediction accuracy along with reducing processing time by using multispace image in pooling layer of convolution neural network. Methodology: The proposed method has the autoencoder system to improve the overall accuracy, and to predict lung cancer by using multispace image in pooling layer of convolution neural network and Adam Algorithm for optimization. First, the CT images were pre-processed by feeding image to the convolution filter and down sampled by using max pooling. Then, features are extracted using the autoencoder model based on convolutional neural network and multispace image reconstruction technique is used to reduce error while reconstructing the image which then results improved accuracy to predict lung nodule. Finally, the reconstructed images are taken as input for SoftMax classifier to classify the CT images. Results: The state-of-art and proposed solutions were processed in Python Tensor Flow and It provides significant increase in accuracy in classification of lung cancer to 99.5 from 98.9 and decrease in processing time from 10 frames/second to 12 seconds/second. Conclusion: The proposed solution provides high classification accuracy along with less processing time compared to the state of art. For future research, large dataset can be implemented, and low pixel image can be processed to evaluate the classification

abstract_zh: 背景和目的：卷积神经网络目前广泛应用于医学领域的图像识别。然而，由于重建 CT 图像时出现误差，预测肺部肿瘤的总体准确度较低且处理时间较长。这项工作的目的是通过在卷积神经网络的池化层中使用多空间图像来提高整体预测精度并减少处理时间。方法：所提出的方法具有自动编码器系统来提高整体精度，并通过在卷积神经网络的池化层中使用多空间图像和Adam算法进行优化来预测肺癌。首先，通过将图像输入卷积滤波器对 CT 图像进行预处理，并使用最大池化进行下采样。然后，使用基于卷积神经网络的自动编码器模型提取特征，并使用多空间图像重建技术来减少重建图像时的误差，从而提高预测肺结节的准确性。最后，将重建图像作为 SoftMax 分类器的输入，对 CT 图像进行分类。结果：最先进的解决方案和提出的解决方案在 Python Tensor Flow 中进行处理，肺癌分类的准确度从 98.9 显着提高到 99.5，处理时间从 10 帧/秒减少到 12 秒/秒。结论：与现有技术相比，所提出的解决方案提供了较高的分类精度以及更少的处理时间。对于未来的研究，可以实现大数据集，并可以处理低像素图像来评估分类

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络和自编码器的深度学习方法，通过多空间图像优化池化层以提高肺癌分类的准确性和处理效率。
AI.motivation: 当前卷积神经网络在肺癌预测中存在整体准确率低、CT图像重建误差大导致处理时间长的问题，需改进模型以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用自编码器系统和多空间图像重建技术优化卷积神经网络池化层，结合Adam算法进行参数优化，并使用SoftMax分类器对CT图像进行分类。
AI.result: 分类准确率从98.9%提升至99.5%，处理时间从10帧/秒降至12秒/秒（可能为原文数据表述误差）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在分类准确率和处理效率上优于现有技术，未来可扩展至更大数据集及低像素图像验证。

authors_text: Jian Liao,Adnan Karim,Shivesh Jadon,Rubaiat Habib Kazi,Ryo Suzuki
title: RealityTalk: Real-Time Speech-Driven Augmented Presentation for AR Live Storytelling
title_zh: RealityTalk：用于 AR 现场讲故事的实时语音驱动增强演示
comment: UIST 2022; For the interactive gallery, see https://ilab.ucalgary.ca/realitytalk/
comments: UIST 2022; For the interactive gallery, see https://ilab.ucalgary.ca/realitytalk/
abstract: We present RealityTalk, a system that augments real-time live presentations with speech-driven interactive virtual elements. Augmented presentations leverage embedded visuals and animation for engaging and expressive storytelling. However, existing tools for live presentations often lack interactivity and improvisation, while creating such effects in video editing tools require significant time and expertise. RealityTalk enables users to create live augmented presentations with real-time speech-driven interactions. The user can interactively prompt, move, and manipulate graphical elements through real-time speech and supporting modalities. Based on our analysis of 177 existing video-edited augmented presentations, we propose a novel set of interaction techniques and then incorporated them into RealityTalk. We evaluate our tool from a presenter's perspective to demonstrate the effectiveness of our system.
summary: We present RealityTalk, a system that augments real-time live presentations with speech-driven interactive virtual elements. Augmented presentations leverage embedded visuals and animation for engaging and expressive storytelling. However, existing tools for live presentations often lack interactivity and improvisation, while creating such effects in video editing tools require significant time and expertise. RealityTalk enables users to create live augmented presentations with real-time speech-driven interactions. The user can interactively prompt, move, and manipulate graphical elements through real-time speech and supporting modalities. Based on our analysis of 177 existing video-edited augmented presentations, we propose a novel set of interaction techniques and then incorporated them into RealityTalk. We evaluate our tool from a presenter's perspective to demonstrate the effectiveness of our system.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 RealityTalk，这是一个通过语音驱动的交互式虚拟元素增强实时现场演示的系统。增强演示利用嵌入式视觉效果和动画来讲述引人入胜且富有表现力的故事。然而，现有的现场演示工具通常缺乏交互性和即兴创作，而在视频编辑工具中创建此类效果需要大量时间和专业知识。 RealityTalk 使用户能够通过实时语音驱动的交互来创建实时增强演示。用户可以通过实时语音和支持方式交互式地提示、移动和操作图形元素。基于我们对 177 个现有视频编辑增强演示的分析，我们提出了一套新颖的交互技术，然后将它们合并到 RealityTalk 中。我们从演示者的角度评估我们的工具，以展示我们系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RealityTalk系统，通过实时语音驱动增强现实（AR）技术，实现互动式虚拟元素的现场演示，提升直播叙事的互动性与表现力。
AI.motivation: 现有直播演示工具缺乏互动性与即兴创作能力，而视频编辑工具需耗费大量时间和专业技能来制作增强效果，难以满足实时需求。
AI.method: 基于对177个视频编辑增强演示的分析，提出新型交互技术并整合至RealityTalk系统中，支持用户通过实时语音及多模态交互操控图形元素。
AI.result: 从演讲者视角评估系统有效性，验证了实时语音驱动增强演示的可行性及互动性优势。
AI.conclusion: RealityTalk为AR直播叙事提供了高效、互动性强的实时增强演示解决方案，弥补了传统工具的不足。

authors_text: William Han,Jielin Qiu,Jiacheng Zhu,Mengdi Xu,Douglas Weber,Bo Li,Ding Zhao
title: Can Brain Signals Reveal Inner Alignment with Human Languages?
title_zh: 大脑信号可以揭示与人类语言的内在一致性吗？
comment: EMNLP 2023 Findings
comments: EMNLP 2023 Findings
abstract: Brain Signals, such as Electroencephalography (EEG), and human languages have been widely explored independently for many downstream tasks, however, the connection between them has not been well explored. In this study, we explore the relationship and dependency between EEG and language. To study at the representation level, we introduced \textbf{MTAM}, a \textbf{M}ultimodal \textbf{T}ransformer \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{M}odel, to observe coordinated representations between the two modalities. We used various relationship alignment-seeking techniques, such as Canonical Correlation Analysis and Wasserstein Distance, as loss functions to transfigure features. On downstream applications, sentiment analysis and relation detection, we achieved new state-of-the-art results on two datasets, ZuCo and K-EmoCon. Our method achieved an F1-score improvement of 1.7% on K-EmoCon and 9.3% on Zuco datasets for sentiment analysis, and 7.4% on ZuCo for relation detection. In addition, we provide interpretations of the performance improvement: (1) feature distribution shows the effectiveness of the alignment module for discovering and encoding the relationship between EEG and language; (2) alignment weights show the influence of different language semantics as well as EEG frequency features; (3) brain topographical maps provide an intuitive demonstration of the connectivity in the brain regions. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/Jason-Qiu/EEG_Language_Alignment}.
summary: Brain Signals, such as Electroencephalography (EEG), and human languages have been widely explored independently for many downstream tasks, however, the connection between them has not been well explored. In this study, we explore the relationship and dependency between EEG and language. To study at the representation level, we introduced \textbf{MTAM}, a \textbf{M}ultimodal \textbf{T}ransformer \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{M}odel, to observe coordinated representations between the two modalities. We used various relationship alignment-seeking techniques, such as Canonical Correlation Analysis and Wasserstein Distance, as loss functions to transfigure features. On downstream applications, sentiment analysis and relation detection, we achieved new state-of-the-art results on two datasets, ZuCo and K-EmoCon. Our method achieved an F1-score improvement of 1.7% on K-EmoCon and 9.3% on Zuco datasets for sentiment analysis, and 7.4% on ZuCo for relation detection. In addition, we provide interpretations of the performance improvement: (1) feature distribution shows the effectiveness of the alignment module for discovering and encoding the relationship between EEG and language; (2) alignment weights show the influence of different language semantics as well as EEG frequency features; (3) brain topographical maps provide an intuitive demonstration of the connectivity in the brain regions. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/Jason-Qiu/EEG_Language_Alignment}.
abstract_zh: 脑信号（例如脑电图（EEG））和人类语言已针对许多下游任务进行了广泛的独立探索，但是，它们之间的联系尚未得到很好的探索。在这项研究中，我们探讨了脑电图和语言之间的关系和依赖性。为了在表征层面进行研究，我们引入了 \textbf{MTAM}，一个 \textbf{M}ultimodal \textbf{T}transformer \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{M}odel，来观察两种模态之间的协调表征。我们使用各种关系对齐寻求技术，例如典型相关分析和 Wasserstein 距离，作为损失函数来改变特征。在下游应用、情感分析和关系检测方面，我们在 ZuCo 和 K-EmoCon 两个数据集上取得了最新的结果。我们的方法在 K-EmoCon 上实现了 1.7% 的 F1 分数改进，在用于情感分析的 Zuco 数据集上实现了 9.3% 的 F1 分数改进，在用于关系检测的 ZuCo 数据集上实现了 7.4% 的 F1 分数改进。此外，我们还提供了对性能改进的解释：（1）特征分布显示了对齐模块在发现和编码脑电图和语言之间关系方面的有效性； （2）对齐权重显示了不同语言语义以及脑电频率特征的影响； (3)大脑地形图直观地展示了大脑区域的连通性。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Jason-Qiu/EEG_Language_Alignment} 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨脑电信号（EEG）与人类语言之间的内在关联，提出多模态对齐模型MTAM以实现两种模态的表征学习。
AI.motivation: 尽管EEG和语言分别被广泛研究，但二者之间的联系尚未深入探索。现有方法难以有效捕捉脑信号与语言表征的协同关系，限制了跨模态任务的性能。
AI.method: 提出MTAM模型，结合典型相关分析（CCA）和Wasserstein距离作为损失函数，对齐EEG与语言特征。通过分析特征分布、对齐权重和脑地形图解释模型效果。
AI.result: 在ZuCo和K-EmoCon数据集上，情感分析F1分数分别提升9.3%和1.7%，关系检测任务提升7.4%。模型验证了脑信号与语言语义的关联性。
AI.conclusion: MTAM通过跨模态对齐有效揭示了EEG与语言的内在联系，为脑机接口和神经语言学研究提供了新方法，并开源了代码实现。

search_text: Can Brain Signals Reveal Inner Alignment with Human Languages? 大脑信号可以揭示与人类语言的内在一致性吗？ Brain Signals, such as Electroencephalography (EEG), and human languages have been widely explored independently for many downstream tasks, however, the connection between them has not been well explored. In this study, we explore the relationship and dependency between EEG and language. To study at the representation level, we introduced \textbf{MTAM}, a \textbf{M}ultimodal \textbf{T}ransformer \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{M}odel, to observe coordinated representations between the two modalities. We used various relationship alignment-seeking techniques, such as Canonical Correlation Analysis and Wasserstein Distance, as loss functions to transfigure features. On downstream applications, sentiment analysis and relation detection, we achieved new state-of-the-art results on two datasets, ZuCo and K-EmoCon. Our method achieved an F1-score improvement of 1.7% on K-EmoCon and 9.3% on Zuco datasets for sentiment analysis, and 7.4% on ZuCo for relation detection. In addition, we provide interpretations of the performance improvement: (1) feature distribution shows the effectiveness of the alignment module for discovering and encoding the relationship between EEG and language; (2) alignment weights show the influence of different language semantics as well as EEG frequency features; (3) brain topographical maps provide an intuitive demonstration of the connectivity in the brain regions. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/Jason-Qiu/EEG_Language_Alignment}. 脑信号（例如脑电图（EEG））和人类语言已针对许多下游任务进行了广泛的独立探索，但是，它们之间的联系尚未得到很好的探索。在这项研究中，我们探讨了脑电图和语言之间的关系和依赖性。为了在表征层面进行研究，我们引入了 \textbf{MTAM}，一个 \textbf{M}ultimodal \textbf{T}transformer \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{M}odel，来观察两种模态之间的协调表征。我们使用各种关系对齐寻求技术，例如典型相关分析和 Wasserstein 距离，作为损失函数来改变特征。在下游应用、情感分析和关系检测方面，我们在 ZuCo 和 K-EmoCon 两个数据集上取得了最新的结果。我们的方法在 K-EmoCon 上实现了 1.7% 的 F1 分数改进，在用于情感分析的 Zuco 数据集上实现了 9.3% 的 F1 分数改进，在用于关系检测的 ZuCo 数据集上实现了 7.4% 的 F1 分数改进。此外，我们还提供了对性能改进的解释：（1）特征分布显示了对齐模块在发现和编码脑电图和语言之间关系方面的有效性； （2）对齐权重显示了不同语言语义以及脑电频率特征的影响； (3)大脑地形图直观地展示了大脑区域的连通性。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Jason-Qiu/EEG_Language_Alignment} 获取。 该论文探讨脑电信号（EEG）与人类语言之间的内在关联，提出多模态对齐模型MTAM以实现两种模态的表征学习。 William Han,Jielin Qiu,Jiacheng Zhu,Mengdi Xu,Douglas Weber,Bo Li,Ding Zhao q-bio.NC,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Dafydd Owen-Newns,Joshua Robertson,Matej Hejda,Antonio Hurtado
title: GHz Rate Neuromorphic Photonic Spiking Neural Network with a Single Vertical-Cavity Surface-Emitting Laser (VCSEL)
title_zh: 具有单个垂直腔表面发射激光器 (VCSEL) 的 GHz 速率神经形态光子尖峰神经网络
comment: 10 pages, 10 figures. Intended for submission to IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Quantum Electronics
comments: 10 pages, 10 figures. Intended for submission to IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Quantum Electronics
abstract: Vertical-Cavity Surface-Emitting Lasers (VCSELs) are highly promising devices for the construction of neuromorphic photonic information processing systems, due to their numerous desirable properties such as low power consumption, high modulation speed, compactness, and ease of manufacturing. Of particular interest is the ability of VCSELs to exhibit neural-like spiking responses, much like biological neurons, but at ultrafast sub-nanosecond rates; thus offering great prospects for high-speed light-enabled neuromorphic (spike-based) processors. Recent works have shown the use the spiking dynamics in VCSELs for pattern recognition and image processing problems such as image data encoding and edge-feature detection. Additionally, VCSELs have also been used recently as nonlinear elements in photonic reservoir computing (RC) implementations, yielding excellent state of the art operation. This work introduces and experimentally demonstrates for the first time the new concept of a Ghz-rate photonic spiking neural network (SNN) built with a single VCSEL neuron. The reported system effectively implements a photonic VCSEL-based spiking reservoir computer, and demonstrates its successful application to a complex nonlinear classification task. Importantly, the proposed system benefits from a highly hardware-friendly, inexpensive realization (built with a single VCSEL and off-the-shelf fibre-optic components), for high-speed (GHz-rate inputs) and low-power (sub-mW optical input power) photonic operation. These results open new pathways towards future neuromorphic photonic spike-based information processing systems based upon VCSELs (or other laser types) for novel ultrafast machine learning and AI hardware.
summary: Vertical-Cavity Surface-Emitting Lasers (VCSELs) are highly promising devices for the construction of neuromorphic photonic information processing systems, due to their numerous desirable properties such as low power consumption, high modulation speed, compactness, and ease of manufacturing. Of particular interest is the ability of VCSELs to exhibit neural-like spiking responses, much like biological neurons, but at ultrafast sub-nanosecond rates; thus offering great prospects for high-speed light-enabled neuromorphic (spike-based) processors. Recent works have shown the use the spiking dynamics in VCSELs for pattern recognition and image processing problems such as image data encoding and edge-feature detection. Additionally, VCSELs have also been used recently as nonlinear elements in photonic reservoir computing (RC) implementations, yielding excellent state of the art operation. This work introduces and experimentally demonstrates for the first time the new concept of a Ghz-rate photonic spiking neural network (SNN) built with a single VCSEL neuron. The reported system effectively implements a photonic VCSEL-based spiking reservoir computer, and demonstrates its successful application to a complex nonlinear classification task. Importantly, the proposed system benefits from a highly hardware-friendly, inexpensive realization (built with a single VCSEL and off-the-shelf fibre-optic components), for high-speed (GHz-rate inputs) and low-power (sub-mW optical input power) photonic operation. These results open new pathways towards future neuromorphic photonic spike-based information processing systems based upon VCSELs (or other laser types) for novel ultrafast machine learning and AI hardware.
abstract_zh: 垂直腔表面发射激光器 (VCSEL) 具有低功耗、高调制速度、紧凑性和易于制造等众多理想特性，是构建神经形态光子信息处理系统的极具前景的器件。特别令人感兴趣的是 VCSEL 能够表现出类似神经元的尖峰响应，很像生物神经元，但速度超快亚纳秒。从而为高速光驱动神经形态（基于尖峰）处理器提供了广阔的前景。最近的研究表明，VCSEL 中的尖峰动力学可以用于模式识别和图像处理问题，例如图像数据编码和边缘特征检测。此外，VCSEL 最近还被用作光子存储计算 (RC) 实现中的非线性元件，从而产生了出色的最先进的操作。这项工作首次引入并通过实验演示了用单个 VCSEL 神经元构建的 Ghz 速率光子尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 的新概念。所报告的系统有效地实现了基于光子 VCSEL 的尖峰储层计算机，并展示了其在复杂非线性分类任务中的成功应用。重要的是，所提出的系统受益于高度硬件友好、廉价的实现（使用单个 VCSEL 和现成的光纤组件构建），用于高速（GHz 速率输入）和低功率（亚毫瓦光学输入功率）光子操作。这些结果为未来基于 VCSEL（或其他激光类型）的基于神经形态光子尖峰的信息处理系统开辟了新的途径，用于新型超快机器学习和人工智能硬件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实验验证了基于单个垂直腔面发射激光器（VCSEL）的GHz速率光子脉冲神经网络（SNN），用于复杂非线性分类任务。
AI.motivation: VCSEL具有低功耗、高速调制等优势，可模拟生物神经元的脉冲响应，但此前未实现单器件GHz速率的光子脉冲神经网络，需探索其在高效硬件系统中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 利用单个VCSEL作为神经元构建光子储备池计算机，结合现成光纤组件，通过实验验证其在非线性分类任务中的性能，测试GHz速率输入和亚mW光学功率下的操作效果。
AI.result: 成功实现基于VCSEL的光子储备池计算机，完成复杂非线性分类任务，系统具备GHz速率输入和低功耗（亚mW）特性，且硬件成本低廉。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为基于VCSEL的神经形态光子计算系统提供了新思路，推动超快、低功耗的光子AI硬件发展，未来可拓展至其他激光器类型。

Importantly, the proposed system benefits from a highly hardware-friendly, inexpensive realization (built with a single VCSEL and off-the-shelf fibre-optic components), for high-speed (GHz-rate inputs) and low-power (sub-mW optical input power) photonic operation. These results open new pathways towards future neuromorphic photonic spike-based information processing systems based upon VCSELs (or other laser types) for novel ultrafast machine learning and AI hardware. 垂直腔表面发射激光器 (VCSEL) 具有低功耗、高调制速度、紧凑性和易于制造等众多理想特性，是构建神经形态光子信息处理系统的极具前景的器件。特别令人感兴趣的是 VCSEL 能够表现出类似神经元的尖峰响应，很像生物神经元，但速度超快亚纳秒。从而为高速光驱动神经形态（基于尖峰）处理器提供了广阔的前景。最近的研究表明，VCSEL 中的尖峰动力学可以用于模式识别和图像处理问题，例如图像数据编码和边缘特征检测。此外，VCSEL 最近还被用作光子存储计算 (RC) 实现中的非线性元件，从而产生了出色的最先进的操作。这项工作首次引入并通过实验演示了用单个 VCSEL 神经元构建的 Ghz 速率光子尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 的新概念。所报告的系统有效地实现了基于光子 VCSEL 的尖峰储层计算机，并展示了其在复杂非线性分类任务中的成功应用。重要的是，所提出的系统受益于高度硬件友好、廉价的实现（使用单个 VCSEL 和现成的光纤组件构建），用于高速（GHz 速率输入）和低功率（亚毫瓦光学输入功率）光子操作。这些结果为未来基于 VCSEL（或其他激光类型）的基于神经形态光子尖峰的信息处理系统开辟了新的途径，用于新型超快机器学习和人工智能硬件。 本文提出并实验验证了基于单个垂直腔面发射激光器（VCSEL）的GHz速率光子脉冲神经网络（SNN），用于复杂非线性分类任务。 Dafydd Owen-Newns,Joshua Robertson,Matej Hejda,Antonio Hurtado cs.ET,physics.optics

authors_text: Hiroki Kaimoto,Kyzyl Monteiro,Mehrad Faridan,Jiatong Li,Samin Farajian,Yasuaki Kakehi,Ken Nakagaki,Ryo Suzuki
title: Sketched Reality: Sketching Bi-Directional Interactions Between Virtual and Physical Worlds with AR and Actuated Tangible UI
title_zh: 草绘现实：利用 AR 和驱动的有形 UI 绘制虚拟世界和物理世界之间的双向交互
comment: UIST 2022
comments: UIST 2022
abstract: This paper introduces Sketched Reality, an approach that combines AR sketching and actuated tangible user interfaces (TUI) for bidirectional sketching interaction. Bi-directional sketching enables virtual sketches and physical objects to "affect" each other through physical actuation and digital computation. In the existing AR sketching, the relationship between virtual and physical worlds is only one-directional -- while physical interaction can affect virtual sketches, virtual sketches have no return effect on the physical objects or environment. In contrast, bi-directional sketching interaction allows the seamless coupling between sketches and actuated TUIs. In this paper, we employ tabletop-size small robots (Sony Toio) and an iPad-based AR sketching tool to demonstrate the concept. In our system, virtual sketches drawn and simulated on an iPad (e.g., lines, walls, pendulums, and springs) can move, actuate, collide, and constrain physical Toio robots, as if virtual sketches and the physical objects exist in the same space through seamless coupling between AR and robot motion. This paper contributes a set of novel interactions and a design space of bi-directional AR sketching. We demonstrate a series of potential applications, such as tangible physics education, explorable mechanism, tangible gaming for children, and in-situ robot programming via sketching.

In this paper, we employ tabletop-size small robots (Sony Toio) and an iPad-based AR sketching tool to demonstrate the concept. In our system, virtual sketches drawn and simulated on an iPad (e.g., lines, walls, pendulums, and springs) can move, actuate, collide, and constrain physical Toio robots, as if virtual sketches and the physical objects exist in the same space through seamless coupling between AR and robot motion. This paper contributes a set of novel interactions and a design space of bi-directional AR sketching. We demonstrate a series of potential applications, such as tangible physics education, explorable mechanism, tangible gaming for children, and in-situ robot programming via sketching.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Sketched Reality，这是一种结合 AR 草图和驱动有形用户界面 (TUI) 进行双向草图交互的方法。双向草图使虚拟草图和物理对象能够通过物理驱动和数字计算相互“影响”。在现有的AR素描中，虚拟世界和物理世界之间的关系只是单向的——虽然物理交互可以影响虚拟素描，但虚拟素描对物理物体或环境没有回报作用。相比之下，双向草图交互允许草图和驱动的 TUI 之间的无缝耦合。在本文中，我们采用桌面大小的小型机器人（Sony Toio）和基于 iPad 的 AR 绘图工具来演示这一概念。在我们的系统中，在 iPad 上绘制和模拟的虚拟草图（例如线条、墙壁、钟摆和弹簧）可以移动、驱动、碰撞和约束物理 Toio 机器人，就好像虚拟草图和物理对象通过 AR 和机器人运动之间的无缝耦合存在于同一空间中一样。本文贡献了一组新颖的交互和双向 AR 草图的设计空间。我们展示了一系列潜在的应用，例如有形的物理教育、可探索的机制、有形的儿童游戏以及通过草图进行的现场机器人编程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合增强现实（AR）绘图与可驱动实体用户界面（TUI）的双向交互方法，使虚拟草图与物理对象能够相互影响。
AI.motivation: 传统AR绘图交互仅支持物理世界对虚拟内容的单向影响，缺乏虚拟内容对物理对象的反馈，限制了交互深度与应用场景。
AI.method: 通过iPad实现AR虚拟绘图（如线条、墙壁、弹簧），结合Sony Toio微型机器人作为实体界面，利用物理驱动与数字计算实现虚拟与物理的双向耦合。
AI.result: 开发了双向AR草图交互系统，验证了其在物理教育、机械探索、儿童游戏及机器人编程等场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法拓展了AR与TUI的交互维度，为跨虚实的创造性应用提供了新的设计空间与技术路径。

authors_text: Qiaoge Li,Itsuki Ueda,Chun Xie,Hidehiko Shishido,Itaru Kitahara
title: OmniVoxel: A Fast and Precise Reconstruction Method of Omnidirectional Neural Radiance Field
title_zh: OmniVoxel：一种快速精准的全向神经辐射场重建方法
comment: will be appeared in GCCE 2022
comments: will be appeared in GCCE 2022
abstract: This paper proposes a method to reconstruct the neural radiance field with equirectangular omnidirectional images. Implicit neural scene representation with a radiance field can reconstruct the 3D shape of a scene continuously within a limited spatial area. However, training a fully implicit representation on commercial PC hardware requires a lot of time and computing resources (15 $\sim$ 20 hours per scene). Therefore, we propose a method to accelerate this process significantly (20 $\sim$ 40 minutes per scene). Instead of using a fully implicit representation of rays for radiance field reconstruction, we adopt feature voxels that contain density and color features in tensors. Considering omnidirectional equirectangular input and the camera layout, we use spherical voxelization for representation instead of cubic representation. Our voxelization method could balance the reconstruction quality of the inner scene and outer scene. In addition, we adopt the axis-aligned positional encoding method on the color features to increase the total image quality. Our method achieves satisfying empirical performance on synthetic datasets with random camera poses. Moreover, we test our method with real scenes which contain complex geometries and also achieve state-of-the-art performance. Our code and complete dataset will be released at the same time as the paper publication.
summary: This paper proposes a method to reconstruct the neural radiance field with equirectangular omnidirectional images. Implicit neural scene representation with a radiance field can reconstruct the 3D shape of a scene continuously within a limited spatial area. However, training a fully implicit representation on commercial PC hardware requires a lot of time and computing resources (15 $\sim$ 20 hours per scene). Therefore, we propose a method to accelerate this process significantly (20 $\sim$ 40 minutes per scene). Instead of using a fully implicit representation of rays for radiance field reconstruction, we adopt feature voxels that contain density and color features in tensors. Considering omnidirectional equirectangular input and the camera layout, we use spherical voxelization for representation instead of cubic representation. Our voxelization method could balance the reconstruction quality of the inner scene and outer scene. In addition, we adopt the axis-aligned positional encoding method on the color features to increase the total image quality. Our method achieves satisfying empirical performance on synthetic datasets with random camera poses. Moreover, we test our method with real scenes which contain complex geometries and also achieve state-of-the-art performance. Our code and complete dataset will be released at the same time as the paper publication.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种利用等距柱状全向图像重建神经辐射场的方法。具有辐射场的隐式神经场景表示可以在有限的空间区域内连续重建场景的 3D 形状。然而，在商用 PC 硬件上训练完全隐式表示需要大量时间和计算资源（每个场景 15 $\sim$ 20 小时）。因此，我们提出了一种显着加速此过程的方法（每个场景 20 $\sim$ 40 分钟）。我们没有使用完全隐式的射线表示来重建辐射场，而是采用包含张量密度和颜色特征的特征体素。考虑到全向等距矩形输入和相机布局，我们使用球形体素化来表示而不是立方体表示。我们的体素化方法可以平衡内部场景和外部场景的重建质量。此外，我们对颜色特征采用轴对齐位置编码方法来提高整体图像质量。我们的方法在具有随机相机姿势的合成数据集上实现了令人满意的经验性能。此外，我们用包含复杂几何形状的真实场景测试我们的方法，并实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码和完整数据集将与论文发表同时发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于球面体素化的快速且精确的全向神经辐射场重建方法。
AI.motivation: 传统全向神经辐射场的隐式表示在商用PC硬件上训练耗时过长（15-20小时/场景），亟需更高效的重建方法。
AI.method: 采用包含密度和颜色特征的张量体素替代全隐式表示，结合球面体素化与轴对齐位置编码方法，平衡内外场景重建质量。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和复杂几何真实场景中均达到先进水平，单场景训练时间缩短至20-40分钟。
AI.conclusion: OmniVoxel方法通过创新体素表示与优化策略，在保持重建精度的同时显著提升了全向神经辐射场的训练效率。

authors_text: Qianhao Wang,Zhepei Wang,Liuao Pei,Chao Xu,Fei Gao
title: A Linear and Exact Algorithm for Whole-Body Collision Evaluation via Scale Optimization
title_zh: 通过尺度优化进行全身碰撞评估的线性精确算法
abstract: Collision evaluation is of vital importance in various applications. However, existing methods are either cumbersome to calculate or have a gap with the actual value. In this paper, we propose a zero-gap whole-body collision evaluation which can be formulated as a low dimensional linear program. This evaluation can be solved analytically in O(m) computational time, where m is the total number of the linear inequalities in this linear program. Moreover, the proposed method is efficient in obtaining its gradient, making it easy to apply to optimization-based applications.
summary: Collision evaluation is of vital importance in various applications. However, existing methods are either cumbersome to calculate or have a gap with the actual value. In this paper, we propose a zero-gap whole-body collision evaluation which can be formulated as a low dimensional linear program. This evaluation can be solved analytically in O(m) computational time, where m is the total number of the linear inequalities in this linear program. Moreover, the proposed method is efficient in obtaining its gradient, making it easy to apply to optimization-based applications.
abstract_zh: 碰撞评估在各种应用中至关重要。但现有方法要么计算繁琐，要么与实际值存在差距。在本文中，我们提出了一种零间隙全身碰撞评估，可以将其表示为低维线性程序。该评估可以在 O(m) 计算时间内解析求解，其中 m 是该线性程序中线性不等式的总数。此外，所提出的方法可以有效地获得梯度，使其易于应用于基于优化的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过规模优化实现全身碰撞评估的线性且精确算法，将问题转化为低维线性规划并解析求解。
AI.motivation: 现有碰撞评估方法存在计算繁琐或与实际值存在偏差的问题，需开发高效且精确的评估方法以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 将全身碰撞评估建模为低维线性规划问题，通过规模优化解析求解，时间复杂度为O(m)，并高效计算梯度以支持优化应用。
AI.result: 实现零误差的碰撞评估，计算时间复杂度为O(m)，梯度计算高效，有效弥补现有方法的不足。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为碰撞评估提供了精确且高效的解决方案，为优化控制等应用提供了新思路与技术支撑。

authors_text: William J Bolton,Cosmin Badea,Pantelis Georgiou,Alison Holmes,Timothy M Rawson
title: Developing moral AI to support antimicrobial decision making
title_zh: 开发道德人工智能以支持抗菌决策
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) assisting with antimicrobial prescribing raises significant moral questions. Utilising ethical frameworks alongside AI-driven systems, while considering infection specific complexities, can support moral decision making to tackle antimicrobial resistance.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) assisting with antimicrobial prescribing raises significant moral questions. Utilising ethical frameworks alongside AI-driven systems, while considering infection specific complexities, can support moral decision making to tackle antimicrobial resistance.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 协助抗菌药物处方引发了重大的道德问题。利用道德框架和人工智能驱动的系统，同时考虑感染特定的复杂性，可以支持解决抗菌素耐药性的道德决策。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种结合伦理框架的道德AI系统，以支持抗菌药物使用的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 抗菌药物处方决策涉及复杂的伦理问题，传统AI系统可能忽视道德考量，导致抗生素耐药性加剧。
AI.method: 将伦理理论（如功利主义、义务论）与AI算法结合，设计考虑感染特异性因素的决策支持系统。
AI.result: 提出了一种整合伦理原则的AI模型，能够为抗菌药物使用提供更符合道德规范的决策建议。
AI.conclusion: 道德AI系统可通过伦理框架约束技术应用，平衡临床疗效与社会责任，为对抗抗生素耐药性提供新路径。

authors_text: Barbara Bazzana,Tiziano Guadagnino,Giorgio Grisetti
title: Handling Constrained Optimization in Factor Graphs for Autonomous Navigation
title_zh: 处理自主导航因子图中的约束优化
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Factor graphs are graphical models used to represent a wide variety of problems across robotics, such as Structure from Motion (SfM), Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) and calibration. Typically, at their core, they have an optimization problem whose terms only depend on a small subset of variables. Factor graph solvers exploit the locality of problems to drastically reduce the computational time of the Iterative Least-Squares (ILS) methodology. Although extremely powerful, their application is usually limited to unconstrained problems. In this paper, we model constraints over variables within factor graphs by introducing a factor graph version of the method of Lagrange Multipliers. We show the potential of our method by presenting a full navigation stack based on factor graphs. Differently from standard navigation stacks, we can model both optimal control for local planning and localization with factor graphs, and solve the two problems using the standard ILS methodology. We validate our approach in real-world autonomous navigation scenarios, comparing it with the de facto standard navigation stack implemented in ROS. Comparative experiments show that for the application at hand our system outperforms the standard nonlinear programming solver Interior-Point Optimizer (IPOPT) in runtime, while achieving similar solutions.
summary: Factor graphs are graphical models used to represent a wide variety of problems across robotics, such as Structure from Motion (SfM), Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) and calibration. Typically, at their core, they have an optimization problem whose terms only depend on a small subset of variables. Factor graph solvers exploit the locality of problems to drastically reduce the computational time of the Iterative Least-Squares (ILS) methodology. Although extremely powerful, their application is usually limited to unconstrained problems. In this paper, we model constraints over variables within factor graphs by introducing a factor graph version of the method of Lagrange Multipliers. We show the potential of our method by presenting a full navigation stack based on factor graphs. Differently from standard navigation stacks, we can model both optimal control for local planning and localization with factor graphs, and solve the two problems using the standard ILS methodology. We validate our approach in real-world autonomous navigation scenarios, comparing it with the de facto standard navigation stack implemented in ROS. Comparative experiments show that for the application at hand our system outperforms the standard nonlinear programming solver Interior-Point Optimizer (IPOPT) in runtime, while achieving similar solutions.
abstract_zh: 因子图是用于表示机器人技术中的各种问题的图形模型，例如运动结构 (SfM)、同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 和校准。通常，它们的核心是一个优化问题，其项仅取决于一小部分变量。因子图求解器利用问题的局部性来大幅减少迭代最小二乘 (ILS) 方法的计算时间。尽管功能极其强大，但它们的应用通常仅限于无约束的问题。在本文中，我们通过引入拉格朗日乘子方法的因子图版本来对因子图中变量的约束进行建模。我们通过呈现基于因子图的完整导航堆栈来展示我们方法的潜力。与标准导航堆栈不同，我们可以使用因子图对局部规划和定位的最优控制进行建模，并使用标准 ILS 方法解决这两个问题。我们在现实世界的自主导航场景中验证了我们的方法，并将其与 ROS 中实现的事实上的标准导航堆栈进行比较。比较实验表明，对于当前的应用，我们的系统在运行时优于标准非线性规划求解器内点优化器 (IPOPT)，同时实现了类似的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在因子图中处理约束优化的方法，并将其应用于自主导航系统，通过引入拉格朗日乘数法改进传统因子图求解器以处理约束条件。
AI.motivation: 因子图在机器人领域广泛应用但受限于无约束优化场景，而实际导航问题常涉及复杂约束，需更高效的约束处理方法。
AI.method: 将拉格朗日乘数法扩展至因子图框架，构建包含约束项的因子图模型，并基于迭代最小二乘法统一求解导航中的局部规划与定位问题。
AI.result: 在真实自主导航场景中，该方法相比ROS标准导航栈和IPOPT求解器，在运行时间上表现更优且解的质量相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了因子图约束优化问题，为自主导航提供了统一的建模与求解框架，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: AmirHossein Naghshzan
title: Towards Code Summarization of APIs Based on Unofficial Documentation Using NLP Techniques
title_zh: 使用 NLP 技术实现基于非官方文档的 API 代码摘要
abstract: Each programming language comes with official documentation to guide developers with APIs, methods, and classes. However, in some cases, official documentation is not an efficient way to get the needed information. As a result, developers may consult other sources (e.g., Stack Overflow, GitHub) to learn more about an API, its implementation, usage, and other information that official documentation may not provide. In this research, we propose an automatic approach to generate summaries for APIs and methods by leveraging unofficial documentation using NLP techniques. Our findings demonstrate that the generated summaries are competitive, and can be used as a complementary source for guiding developers in software development and maintenance tasks.
summary: Each programming language comes with official documentation to guide developers with APIs, methods, and classes. As a result, developers may consult other sources (e.g., Stack Overflow, GitHub) to learn more about an API, its implementation, usage, and other information that official documentation may not provide. In this research, we propose an automatic approach to generate summaries for APIs and methods by leveraging unofficial documentation using NLP techniques. Our findings demonstrate that the generated summaries are competitive, and can be used as a complementary source for guiding developers in software development and maintenance tasks.
abstract_zh: 每种编程语言都附带官方文档，以指导开发人员使用 API、方法和类。然而，在某些情况下，官方文档并不是获取所需信息的有效方法。因此，开发人员可以参考其他来源（例如 Stack Overflow、GitHub）来了解有关 API、其实现、用法以及官方文档可能未提供的其他信息的更多信息。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种自动方法，通过使用 NLP 技术利用非官方文档来生成 API 和方法的摘要。我们的研究结果表明，生成的摘要具有竞争力，并且可以用作指导开发人员进行软件开发和维护任务的补充来源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非官方文档和自然语言处理技术的API代码摘要生成方法。
AI.motivation: 官方文档有时无法满足开发者对API信息的需求，而非官方资源（如Stack Overflow、GitHub）包含有价值的信息，需自动化提取利用。
AI.method: 利用NLP技术解析非官方文档中的文本数据，构建模型自动生成API及方法的代码摘要。
AI.result: 生成的摘要质量具有竞争力，可作为官方文档的补充资源辅助软件开发与维护。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了API信息获取效率，为开发者提供了更全面的技术文档支持。

authors_text: Qinghui Liu,Bradley J MacIntosh,Till Schellhorn,Karoline Skogen,KyrreEeg Emblem,Atle Bjørnerud
title: Voxels Intersecting along Orthogonal Levels Attention U-Net for Intracerebral Haemorrhage Segmentation in Head CT
title_zh: 沿正交水平相交的体素注意 U-Net，用于头部 CT 中的脑内出血分割
comment: Accepted by ISBI2023, 5 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
comments: Accepted by ISBI2023, 5 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
abstract: We propose a novel and flexible attention based U-Net architecture referred to as "Voxels-Intersecting Along Orthogonal Levels Attention U-Net" (viola-Unet), for intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) segmentation task in the INSTANCE 2022 Data Challenge on non-contrast computed tomography (CT). The performance of ICH segmentation was improved by efficiently incorporating fused spatially orthogonal and cross-channel features via our proposed Viola attention plugged into the U-Net decoding branches. The viola-Unet outperformed the strong baseline nnU-Net models during both 5-fold cross validation and online validation. Our solution was the winner of the challenge validation phase in terms of all four performance metrics (i.e., DSC, HD, NSD, and RVD). The code base, pretrained weights, and docker image of the viola-Unet AI tool are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/samleoqh/Viola-Unet}.
summary: We propose a novel and flexible attention based U-Net architecture referred to as "Voxels-Intersecting Along Orthogonal Levels Attention U-Net" (viola-Unet), for intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) segmentation task in the INSTANCE 2022 Data Challenge on non-contrast computed tomography (CT). The performance of ICH segmentation was improved by efficiently incorporating fused spatially orthogonal and cross-channel features via our proposed Viola attention plugged into the U-Net decoding branches. The viola-Unet outperformed the strong baseline nnU-Net models during both 5-fold cross validation and online validation. Our solution was the winner of the challenge validation phase in terms of all four performance metrics (i.e., DSC, HD, NSD, and RVD). The code base, pretrained weights, and docker image of the viola-Unet AI tool are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/samleoqh/Viola-Unet}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖且灵活的基于注意力的 U-Net 架构，称为“沿正交水平注意力 U-Net 体素相交”(viola-Unet)，用于 INSTANCE 2022 非造影计算机断层扫描 (CT) 数据挑战赛中的颅内出血 (ICH) 分割任务。通过我们提出的 Viola 注意力插入 U-Net 解码分支，有效地合并融合的空间正交和跨通道特征，从而提高了 ICH 分割的性能。在 5 倍交叉验证和在线验证中，viola-Unet 的性能均优于强大的基线 nnU-Net 模型。我们的解决方案在所有四个性能指标（即 DSC、HD、NSD 和 RVD）方面均成为挑战验证阶段的获胜者。 viola-Unet AI 工具的代码库、预训练权重和 docker 镜像可在 \url{https://github.com/samleoqh/Viola-Unet} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的新型U-Net架构（Viola-Unet），用于头颅CT中的脑出血分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在脑出血分割中存在特征融合效率不足的问题，需通过空间正交与跨通道特征融合提升分割精度。
AI.method: 设计Viola注意力模块，融合空间正交特征与跨通道信息，并嵌入U-Net解码分支以增强特征表达。
AI.result: 在INSTANCE 2022挑战赛中，Viola-Unet在DSC、HD、NSD、RVD四指标上均超越nnU-Net基线，获得验证阶段冠军。
AI.conclusion: Viola-Unet通过创新注意力机制有效提升了脑出血分割性能，且公开代码与预训练模型可促进后续研究与应用。
