search_text: What is it like to program with artificial intelligence? 用人工智能编程是什么感觉？ Large language models, such as OpenAI's codex and Deepmind's AlphaCode, can generate code to solve a variety of problems expressed in natural language. This technology has already been commercialised in at least one widely-used programming editor extension: GitHub Copilot. In this paper, we explore how programming with large language models (LLM-assisted programming) is similar to, and differs from, prior conceptualisations of programmer assistance. We draw upon publicly available experience reports of LLM-assisted programming, as well as prior usability and design studies. We find that while LLM-assisted programming shares some properties of compilation, pair programming, and programming via search and reuse, there are fundamental differences both in the technical possibilities as well as the practical experience. Thus, LLM-assisted programming ought to be viewed as a new way of programming with its own distinct properties and challenges. Finally, we draw upon observations from a user study in which non-expert end user programmers use LLM-assisted tools for solving data tasks in spreadsheets. We discuss the issues that might arise, and open research challenges, in applying large language models to end-user programming, particularly with users who have little or no programming expertise. 大型语言模型，例如OpenAI的codex和Deepmind的AlphaCode，可以生成代码来解决用自然语言表达的各种问题。这项技术已经在至少一个广泛使用的编程编辑器扩展中实现商业化：GitHub Copilot。在本文中，我们探讨了使用大型语言模型进行编程（法学硕士辅助编程）与先前的程序员辅助概念有何相似和不同。我们借鉴了法学硕士辅助编程的公开经验报告，以及之前的可用性和设计研究。我们发现，虽然LLM辅助编程与编译、结对编程以及通过搜索和重用进行编程有一些共同的特性，但在技术可能性和实践经验上都存在根本差异。因此，法学硕士辅助编程应该被视为一种新的编程方式，具有其独特的特性和挑战。最后，我们借鉴了一项用户研究的观察结果，其中非专家最终用户程序员使用法学硕士辅助工具来解决电子表格中的数据任务。我们讨论将大型语言模型应用于最终用户编程时可能出现的问题以及开放的研究挑战，特别是对于那些很少或没有编程专业知识的用户。 本文分析了基于大语言模型（LLM）的编程辅助技术（如GitHub Copilot）的特点，探讨其与传统编程辅助方式的异同，并研究其在非专业用户中的应用挑战。 Advait Sarkar,Andrew D. Gordon,Carina Negreanu,Christian Poelitz,Sruti Srinivasa Ragavan,Ben Zorn cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.PL

authors_text: Roger Trullo,Quoc-Anh Bui,Qi Tang,Reza Olfati-Saber
title: Image Translation Based Nuclei Segmentation for Immunohistochemistry Images
title_zh: 基于图像翻译的免疫组织化学图像细胞核分割
abstract: Numerous deep learning based methods have been developed for nuclei segmentation for H&E images and have achieved close to human performance. However, direct application of such methods to another modality of images, such as Immunohistochemistry (IHC) images, may not achieve satisfactory performance. Thus, we developed a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based approach to translate an IHC image to an H&E image while preserving nuclei location and morphology and then apply pre-trained nuclei segmentation models to the virtual H&E image. We demonstrated that the proposed methods work better than several baseline methods including direct application of state of the art nuclei segmentation methods such as Cellpose and HoVer-Net, trained on H&E and a generative method, DeepLIIF, using two public IHC image datasets.
summary: Numerous deep learning based methods have been developed for nuclei segmentation for H&E images and have achieved close to human performance. However, direct application of such methods to another modality of images, such as Immunohistochemistry (IHC) images, may not achieve satisfactory performance. Thus, we developed a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based approach to translate an IHC image to an H&E image while preserving nuclei location and morphology and then apply pre-trained nuclei segmentation models to the virtual H&E image. We demonstrated that the proposed methods work better than several baseline methods including direct application of state of the art nuclei segmentation methods such as Cellpose and HoVer-Net, trained on H&E and a generative method, DeepLIIF, using two public IHC image datasets.
abstract_zh: 许多基于深度学习的方法已经被开发用于 H&E 图像的细胞核分割，并且已经实现了接近人类的表现。然而，将此类方法直接应用于另一种图像模式，例如免疫组织化学（IHC）图像，可能无法获得令人满意的性能。因此，我们开发了一种基于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的方法，将 IHC 图像转换为 H&E 图像，同时保留细胞核位置和形态，然后将预训练的细胞核分割模型应用于虚拟 H&E 图像。我们证明了所提出的方法比几种基线方法效果更好，包括直接应用最先进的细胞核分割方法，例如 Cellpose 和 HoVer-Net，在 H&E 上进行训练，以及使用两个公共 IHC 图像数据集的生成方法 DeepLIIF。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像翻译的免疫组化（IHC）图像细胞核分割方法，通过生成对抗网络（GAN）将IHC图像转换为H&E图像后再进行分割。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在H&E图像细胞核分割表现优异，但直接应用于IHC图像效果不佳，需探索适配IHC图像的分割方案。
AI.method: 设计GAN模型将IHC图像翻译为保留细胞核位置和形态的虚拟H&E图像，再利用预训练的H&E图像分割模型（如Cellpose、HoVer-Net）进行分割。
AI.result: 在两个公开IHC数据集上，该方法优于直接应用现有分割模型及生成方法DeepLIIF等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 图像翻译策略有效解决了IHC图像细胞核分割难题，为跨模态医学图像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Georgios Kouros,Shubham Shrivastava,Cédric Picron,Sushruth Nagesh,Punarjay Chakravarty,Tinne Tuytelaars
title: Category-Level Pose Retrieval with Contrastive Features Learnt with Occlusion Augmentation
title_zh: 通过遮挡增强学习对比特征的类别级姿势检索
comment: 29 pages, 16 Figures, 14 tables, BMVC 2022
comments: 29 pages, 16 Figures, 14 tables, BMVC 2022
abstract: Pose estimation is usually tackled as either a bin classification or a regression problem. In both cases, the idea is to directly predict the pose of an object. This is a non-trivial task due to appearance variations between similar poses and similarities between dissimilar poses. Instead, we follow the key idea that comparing two poses is easier than directly predicting one. Render-and-compare approaches have been employed to that end, however, they tend to be unstable, computationally expensive, and slow for real-time applications. We propose doing category-level pose estimation by learning an alignment metric in an embedding space using a contrastive loss with a dynamic margin and a continuous pose-label space. For efficient inference, we use a simple real-time image retrieval scheme with a pre-rendered and pre-embedded reference set of renderings. To achieve robustness to real-world conditions, we employ synthetic occlusions, bounding box perturbations, and appearance augmentations. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on PASCAL3D and OccludedPASCAL3D and surpasses the competing methods on KITTI3D in a cross-dataset evaluation setting. The code is currently available at https://github.com/gkouros/contrastive-pose-retrieval.
summary: Pose estimation is usually tackled as either a bin classification or a regression problem. In both cases, the idea is to directly predict the pose of an object. This is a non-trivial task due to appearance variations between similar poses and similarities between dissimilar poses. Instead, we follow the key idea that comparing two poses is easier than directly predicting one. Render-and-compare approaches have been employed to that end, however, they tend to be unstable, computationally expensive, and slow for real-time applications. We propose doing category-level pose estimation by learning an alignment metric in an embedding space using a contrastive loss with a dynamic margin and a continuous pose-label space. For efficient inference, we use a simple real-time image retrieval scheme with a pre-rendered and pre-embedded reference set of renderings. To achieve robustness to real-world conditions, we employ synthetic occlusions, bounding box perturbations, and appearance augmentations. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on PASCAL3D and OccludedPASCAL3D and surpasses the competing methods on KITTI3D in a cross-dataset evaluation setting. The code is currently available at https://github.com/gkouros/contrastive-pose-retrieval.
abstract_zh: 姿态估计通常作为箱分类或回归问题来解决。在这两种情况下，想法都是直接预测物体的姿势。由于相似姿势之间的外观变化以及不同姿势之间的相似性，这是一项不平凡的任务。相反，我们遵循的关键思想是比较两个姿势比直接预测一个姿势更容易。为此，已经采用了渲染和比较方法，但是，它们往往不稳定、计算成本高且对于实时应用程序来说速度慢。我们建议通过使用具有动态边距和连续姿势标签空间的对比损失来学习嵌入空间中的对齐度量来进行类别级姿势估计。为了高效推理，我们使用简单的实时图像检索方案以及预渲染和预嵌入的渲染参考集。为了实现对现实条件的鲁棒性，我们采用了合成遮挡、边界框扰动和外观增强。我们的方法在 PASCAL3D 和 OcclusiondPASCAL3D 上实现了最先进的性能，并在跨数据集评估设置中超越了 KITTI3D 上的竞争方法。该代码目前可在 https://github.com/gkouros/contrastive-pose-retrieval 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习和遮挡增强的类别级姿态检索方法，通过嵌入空间中的对齐度量实现高效姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统姿态估计方法直接预测姿态存在相似姿态外观差异和不同姿态相似性的问题，而对比学习通过姿态间比较更易实现，但现有方法存在计算量大、实时性差等缺陷。
AI.method: 采用动态边距对比损失和连续姿态标签空间学习嵌入空间对齐度量，结合预渲染参考集的实时图像检索方案，并通过合成遮挡、边界框扰动和外观增强提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在PASCAL3D和OccludedPASCAL3D数据集上达到SOTA性能，在KITTI3D跨数据集评估中超越竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过对比特征学习和遮挡增强有效解决了类别级姿态估计的挑战，实现了高效且鲁棒的姿态检索。

search_text: Category-Level Pose Retrieval with Contrastive Features Learnt with Occlusion Augmentation 通过遮挡增强学习对比特征的类别级姿势检索 Pose estimation is usually tackled as either a bin classification or a regression problem. In both cases, the idea is to directly predict the pose of an object. This is a non-trivial task due to appearance variations between similar poses and similarities between dissimilar poses. Instead, we follow the key idea that comparing two poses is easier than directly predicting one. Render-and-compare approaches have been employed to that end, however, they tend to be unstable, computationally expensive, and slow for real-time applications. We propose doing category-level pose estimation by learning an alignment metric in an embedding space using a contrastive loss with a dynamic margin and a continuous pose-label space. For efficient inference, we use a simple real-time image retrieval scheme with a pre-rendered and pre-embedded reference set of renderings. To achieve robustness to real-world conditions, we employ synthetic occlusions, bounding box perturbations, and appearance augmentations. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on PASCAL3D and OccludedPASCAL3D and surpasses the competing methods on KITTI3D in a cross-dataset evaluation setting. The code is currently available at https://github.com/gkouros/contrastive-pose-retrieval. 姿态估计通常作为箱分类或回归问题来解决。在这两种情况下，想法都是直接预测物体的姿势。由于相似姿势之间的外观变化以及不同姿势之间的相似性，这是一项不平凡的任务。相反，我们遵循的关键思想是比较两个姿势比直接预测一个姿势更容易。为此，已经采用了渲染和比较方法，但是，它们往往不稳定、计算成本高且对于实时应用程序来说速度慢。我们建议通过使用具有动态边距和连续姿势标签空间的对比损失来学习嵌入空间中的对齐度量来进行类别级姿势估计。为了高效推理，我们使用简单的实时图像检索方案以及预渲染和预嵌入的渲染参考集。为了实现对现实条件的鲁棒性，我们采用了合成遮挡、边界框扰动和外观增强。我们的方法在 PASCAL3D 和 OcclusiondPASCAL3D 上实现了最先进的性能，并在跨数据集评估设置中超越了 KITTI3D 上的竞争方法。该代码目前可在 https://github.com/gkouros/contrastive-pose-retrieval 获取。 本文提出一种基于对比学习和遮挡增强的类别级姿态检索方法，通过嵌入空间中的对齐度量实现高效姿态估计。 Georgios Kouros,Shubham Shrivastava,Cédric Picron,Sushruth Nagesh,Punarjay Chakravarty,Tinne Tuytelaars cs.CV

authors_text: Zichen Ma,Yu Lu,Wenye Li,Shuguang Cui
title: Personalizing or Not: Dynamically Personalized Federated Learning with Incentives
title_zh: 是否个性化：带激励的动态个性化联邦学习
comment: Withdrawal for further revision
comments: Withdrawal for further revision
abstract: Personalized federated learning (FL) facilitates collaborations between multiple clients to learn personalized models without sharing private data. The mechanism mitigates the statistical heterogeneity commonly encountered in the system, i.e., non-IID data over different clients. Existing personalized algorithms generally assume all clients volunteer for personalization. However, potential participants might still be reluctant to personalize models since they might not work well. In this case, clients choose to use the global model instead. To avoid making unrealistic assumptions, we introduce the personalization rate, measured as the fraction of clients willing to train personalized models, into federated settings and propose DyPFL. This dynamically personalized FL technique incentivizes clients to participate in personalizing local models while allowing the adoption of the global model when it performs better. We show that the algorithmic pipeline in DyPFL guarantees good convergence performance, allowing it to outperform alternative personalized methods in a broad range of conditions, including variation in heterogeneity, number of clients, local epochs, and batch sizes.
summary: Personalized federated learning (FL) facilitates collaborations between multiple clients to learn personalized models without sharing private data. The mechanism mitigates the statistical heterogeneity commonly encountered in the system, i.e., non-IID data over different clients. Existing personalized algorithms generally assume all clients volunteer for personalization. However, potential participants might still be reluctant to personalize models since they might not work well. In this case, clients choose to use the global model instead. To avoid making unrealistic assumptions, we introduce the personalization rate, measured as the fraction of clients willing to train personalized models, into federated settings and propose DyPFL. This dynamically personalized FL technique incentivizes clients to participate in personalizing local models while allowing the adoption of the global model when it performs better. We show that the algorithmic pipeline in DyPFL guarantees good convergence performance, allowing it to outperform alternative personalized methods in a broad range of conditions, including variation in heterogeneity, number of clients, local epochs, and batch sizes.
abstract_zh: 个性化联合学习 (FL) 促进多个客户端之间的协作，以在不共享私有数据的情况下学习个性化模型。该机制减轻了系统中常见的统计异质性，即不同客户端上的非独立同分布数据。现有的个性化算法通常假设所有客户都自愿进行个性化。然而，潜在的参与者可能仍然不愿意个性化模型，因为它们可能效果不佳。在这种情况下，客户选择使用全局模型。为了避免做出不切实际的假设，我们将个性化率（以愿意训练个性化模型的客户比例来衡量）引入到联合设置中，并提出了 DyPFL。这种动态个性化 FL 技术激励客户参与个性化本地模型，同时允许在性能更好时采用全局模型。我们表明，DyPFL 中的算法管道保证了良好的收敛性能，使其能够在广泛的条件下优于替代的个性化方法，包括异质性、客户端数量、本地时期和批量大小的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态个性化联邦学习框架DyPFL，通过引入个性化率衡量客户端参与意愿，实现个性化与全局模型的自适应选择。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化联邦学习假设所有客户端均参与个性化，但实际中客户端可能因模型效果不佳而选择使用全局模型，导致假设不现实。
AI.method: 引入个性化率指标，设计DyPFL算法动态激励客户端参与本地模型训练，同时允许在全局模型性能更优时切换使用。
AI.result: DyPFL在数据异质性、客户端数量、本地训练轮次和批量大小等多种场景下均优于现有个性化方法，收敛性能更优。
AI.conclusion: DyPFL通过动态平衡个性化与全局模型选择，有效解决了联邦学习中客户端参与意愿差异问题，提升了算法适应性。

authors_text: Xiujun Shu,Wei Wen,Taian Guo,Sunan He,Chen Wu,Ruizhi Qiao
title: Exploiting Feature Diversity for Make-up Temporal Video Grounding
title_zh: 利用特征多样性进行化妆时间视频接地
comment: 3st Place in PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding (MTVG) Challenge in ACM-MM 2022
comments: 3st Place in PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding (MTVG) Challenge in ACM-MM 2022
abstract: This technical report presents the 3rd winning solution for MTVG, a new task introduced in the 4-th Person in Context (PIC) Challenge at ACM MM 2022. MTVG aims at localizing the temporal boundary of the step in an untrimmed video based on a textual description. The biggest challenge of this task is the fi ne-grained video-text semantics of make-up steps. However, current methods mainly extract video features using action-based pre-trained models. As actions are more coarse-grained than make-up steps, action-based features are not sufficient to provide fi ne-grained cues. To address this issue,we propose to achieve fi ne-grained representation via exploiting feature diversities. Specifically, we proposed a series of methods from feature extraction, network optimization, to model ensemble. As a result, we achieved 3rd place in the MTVG competition.
summary: This technical report presents the 3rd winning solution for MTVG, a new task introduced in the 4-th Person in Context (PIC) Challenge at ACM MM 2022. MTVG aims at localizing the temporal boundary of the step in an untrimmed video based on a textual description. The biggest challenge of this task is the fi ne-grained video-text semantics of make-up steps. However, current methods mainly extract video features using action-based pre-trained models. As actions are more coarse-grained than make-up steps, action-based features are not sufficient to provide fi ne-grained cues. To address this issue,we propose to achieve fi ne-grained representation via exploiting feature diversities. Specifically, we proposed a series of methods from feature extraction, network optimization, to model ensemble. As a result, we achieved 3rd place in the MTVG competition.
abstract_zh: 本技术报告介绍了 MTVG 的第三个获奖解决方案，这是 ACM MM 2022 年第四届人物情境 (PIC) 挑战赛中引入的一项新任务。MTVG 旨在基于文本描述来定位未修剪视频中步骤的时间边界。这项任务的最大挑战是化妆步骤的细粒度视频文本语义。然而，当前的方法主要使用基于动作的预训练模型来提取视频特征。由于动作比化妆步骤更粗粒度，因此基于动作的特征不足以提供细粒度的提示。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过利用特征多样性来实现细粒度的表示。具体来说，我们提出了从特征提取、网络优化到模型集成的一系列方法。最终，我们在 MTVG 比赛中获得了第三名。

AI.tldr: 该论文主要解决MTVG任务，即根据文本描述在未剪辑视频中定位化妆步骤的时间边界。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于动作预训练模型提取的粗粒度特征，难以满足化妆步骤所需的细粒度语义，因此需要更精细的特征表示。
AI.method: 通过利用特征多样性，提出包括特征提取、网络优化和模型集成在内的方法，以获得细粒度的视频表示。
AI.result: 在MTVG竞赛中取得第三名的成绩。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果验证了利用特征多样性提升细粒度视频-文本对齐有效，为MTVG任务提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Lassi Raatikainen,Esa Rahtu
title: The Weighting Game: Evaluating Quality of Explainability Methods
title_zh: 加权游戏：评估可解释性方法的质量
comment: Published in: Image Analysis (SCIA 2025), Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS), vol. 15726, pp. 325-338 (2025). This is the submitted-manuscript (pre-review) version. v2: added required preprint notice and updated metadata. Version of Record: see DOI 10.1007/978-3-031-95918-9_23
comments: Published in: Image Analysis (SCIA 2025), Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS), vol. 15726, pp. 325-338 (2025). This is the submitted-manuscript (pre-review) version. v2: added required preprint notice and updated metadata. Version of Record: see DOI 10.1007/978-3-031-95918-9_23
abstract: The objective of this paper is to assess the quality of explanation heatmaps for image classification tasks. To assess the quality of explainability methods, we approach the task through the lens of accuracy and stability. In this work, we make the following contributions. Firstly, we introduce the Weighting Game, which measures how much of a class-guided explanation is contained within the correct class' segmentation mask. Secondly, we introduce a metric for explanation stability, using zooming/panning transformations to measure differences between saliency maps with similar contents. Quantitative experiments are produced, using these new metrics, to evaluate the quality of explanations provided by commonly used CAM methods. The quality of explanations is also contrasted between different model architectures, with findings highlighting the need to consider model architecture when choosing an explainability method.
summary: The objective of this paper is to assess the quality of explanation heatmaps for image classification tasks. To assess the quality of explainability methods, we approach the task through the lens of accuracy and stability. In this work, we make the following contributions. Firstly, we introduce the Weighting Game, which measures how much of a class-guided explanation is contained within the correct class' segmentation mask. Secondly, we introduce a metric for explanation stability, using zooming/panning transformations to measure differences between saliency maps with similar contents. Quantitative experiments are produced, using these new metrics, to evaluate the quality of explanations provided by commonly used CAM methods. The quality of explanations is also contrasted between different model architectures, with findings highlighting the need to consider model architecture when choosing an explainability method.
abstract_zh: 本文的目的是评估图像分类任务的解释热图的质量。为了评估可解释性方法的质量，我们从准确性和稳定性的角度来处理任务。在这项工作中，我们做出了以下贡献。首先，我们介绍加权游戏，它衡量正确类别的分割掩码中包含多少类别引导的解释。其次，我们引入了解释稳定性的度量，使用缩放/平移变换来测量具有相似内容的显着图之间的差异。使用这些新指标进行定量实验，以评估常用 CAM 方法提供的解释的质量。不同模型架构之间的解释质量也存在对比，研究结果强调在选择可解释性方法时需要考虑模型架构。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过准确性和稳定性指标评估图像分类任务中可解释性方法生成的解释热图质量。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法缺乏统一评估标准，且未充分考虑模型架构对解释质量的影响，需开发新指标进行系统性评估。
AI.method: 提出Weighting Game指标衡量解释与正确类别分割掩码的重合度，并通过缩放/平移变换测试解释稳定性，结合定量实验对比不同模型架构的解释质量。
AI.result: 实验表明常用CAM方法在不同模型架构下解释质量差异显著，稳定性指标能有效区分方法优劣。
AI.conclusion: 选择可解释性方法时需结合具体模型架构，新提出的评估指标可作为质量衡量的有效工具。

authors_text: Zhengcen Li,Yueran Li,Linlin Tang,Tong Zhang,Jingyong Su
title: Two-person Graph Convolutional Network for Skeleton-based Human Interaction Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的人体交互识别的两人图卷积网络
abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) have been the predominant methods in skeleton-based human action recognition, including human-human interaction recognition. However, when dealing with interaction sequences, current GCN-based methods simply split the two-person skeleton into two discrete graphs and perform graph convolution separately as done for single-person action classification. Such operations ignore rich interactive information and hinder effective spatial inter-body relationship modeling. To overcome the above shortcoming, we introduce a novel unified two-person graph to represent inter-body and intra-body correlations between joints. Experiments show accuracy improvements in recognizing both interactions and individual actions when utilizing the proposed two-person graph topology. In addition, We design several graph labeling strategies to supervise the model to learn discriminant spatial-temporal interactive features. Finally, we propose a two-person graph convolutional network (2P-GCN). Our model achieves state-of-the-art results on four benchmarks of three interaction datasets: SBU, interaction subsets of NTU-RGB+D and NTU-RGB+D 120.
summary: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) have been the predominant methods in skeleton-based human action recognition, including human-human interaction recognition. However, when dealing with interaction sequences, current GCN-based methods simply split the two-person skeleton into two discrete graphs and perform graph convolution separately as done for single-person action classification. Such operations ignore rich interactive information and hinder effective spatial inter-body relationship modeling. To overcome the above shortcoming, we introduce a novel unified two-person graph to represent inter-body and intra-body correlations between joints. Experiments show accuracy improvements in recognizing both interactions and individual actions when utilizing the proposed two-person graph topology. In addition, We design several graph labeling strategies to supervise the model to learn discriminant spatial-temporal interactive features. Finally, we propose a two-person graph convolutional network (2P-GCN). Our model achieves state-of-the-art results on four benchmarks of three interaction datasets: SBU, interaction subsets of NTU-RGB+D and NTU-RGB+D 120.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）一直是基于骨架的人类动作识别（包括人与人交互识别）的主要方法。然而，在处理交互序列时，当前基于 GCN 的方法只是将两人骨架分成两个离散图，并像单人动作分类那样分别执行图卷积。此类操作忽略了丰富的交互信息并阻碍了有效的空间人体间关系建模。为了克服上述缺点，我们引入了一种新颖的统一两人图来表示关节之间的身体间和身体内相关性。实验表明，使用所提出的两人图拓扑时，识别交互和个人动作的准确性得到了提高。此外，我们设计了几种图标记策略来监督模型学习判别时空交互特征。最后，我们提出了一个两人图卷积网络（2P-GCN）。我们的模型在三个交互数据集的四个基准上取得了最先进的结果：SBU、NTU-RGB+D 和 NTU-RGB+D 120 的交互子集。

AI.tldr: 提出一种双人图卷积网络（2P-GCN），通过统一的图结构建模人际交互和个体动作，提升基于骨架的交互识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将双人骨架拆分为独立图处理，忽略交互信息，导致空间关系建模不足。
AI.method: 引入统一双人图结构建模关节间交互与个体关联，设计图标注策略引导模型学习时空交互特征，构建2P-GCN框架。
AI.result: 在SBU、NTU-RGB+D及其子集、NTU-RGB+D 120四个基准上取得最先进结果，交互和个体动作识别准确率均提升。
AI.conclusion: 统一双人图结构有效捕捉交互信息，证明了所提方法在建模人际空间关系方面的优越性。

However, when dealing with interaction sequences, current GCN-based methods simply split the two-person skeleton into two discrete graphs and perform graph convolution separately as done for single-person action classification. Such operations ignore rich interactive information and hinder effective spatial inter-body relationship modeling. To overcome the above shortcoming, we introduce a novel unified two-person graph to represent inter-body and intra-body correlations between joints. In addition, We design several graph labeling strategies to supervise the model to learn discriminant spatial-temporal interactive features. Finally, we propose a two-person graph convolutional network (2P-GCN). authors_text: Franco Caspe,Andrew McPherson,Mark Sandler
title: DDX7: Differentiable FM Synthesis of Musical Instrument Sounds
title_zh: DDX7：乐器声音的可微 FM 合成
comment: Accepted to ISMIR 2022. See online supplement at https://fcaspe.github.io/ddx7/
comments: Accepted to ISMIR 2022. See online supplement at https://fcaspe.github.io/ddx7/
abstract: FM Synthesis is a well-known algorithm used to generate complex timbre from a compact set of design primitives. Typically featuring a MIDI interface, it is usually impractical to control it from an audio source. On the other hand, Differentiable Digital Signal Processing (DDSP) has enabled nuanced audio rendering by Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) that learn to control differentiable synthesis layers from arbitrary sound inputs. The training process involves a corpus of audio for supervision, and spectral reconstruction loss functions. Such functions, while being great to match spectral amplitudes, present a lack of pitch direction which can hinder the joint optimization of the parameters of FM synthesizers. In this paper, we take steps towards enabling continuous control of a well-established FM synthesis architecture from an audio input. Firstly, we discuss a set of design constraints that ease spectral optimization of a differentiable FM synthesizer via a standard reconstruction loss. Next, we present Differentiable DX7 (DDX7), a lightweight architecture for neural FM resynthesis of musical instrument sounds in terms of a compact set of parameters. We train the model on instrument samples extracted from the URMP dataset, and quantitatively demonstrate its comparable audio quality against selected benchmarks.
summary: FM Synthesis is a well-known algorithm used to generate complex timbre from a compact set of design primitives. Typically featuring a MIDI interface, it is usually impractical to control it from an audio source. On the other hand, Differentiable Digital Signal Processing (DDSP) has enabled nuanced audio rendering by Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) that learn to control differentiable synthesis layers from arbitrary sound inputs. The training process involves a corpus of audio for supervision, and spectral reconstruction loss functions. Such functions, while being great to match spectral amplitudes, present a lack of pitch direction which can hinder the joint optimization of the parameters of FM synthesizers. In this paper, we take steps towards enabling continuous control of a well-established FM synthesis architecture from an audio input. Firstly, we discuss a set of design constraints that ease spectral optimization of a differentiable FM synthesizer via a standard reconstruction loss. Next, we present Differentiable DX7 (DDX7), a lightweight architecture for neural FM resynthesis of musical instrument sounds in terms of a compact set of parameters. We train the model on instrument samples extracted from the URMP dataset, and quantitatively demonstrate its comparable audio quality against selected benchmarks.
abstract_zh: FM 合成是一种众所周知的算法，用于从一组紧凑的设计原语生成复杂的音色。通常具有 MIDI 接口，从音频源控制它通常是不切实际的。另一方面，可微分数字信号处理 (DDSP) 通过深度神经网络 (DNN) 实现了细致入微的音频渲染，深度神经网络 (DNN) 学习控制来自任意声音输入的可微分合成层。训练过程涉及用于监督的音频语料库和频谱重建损失函数。这些函数虽然可以很好地匹配频谱幅度，但缺乏音调方向，这可能会阻碍 FM 合成器参数的联合优化。在本文中，我们采取措施从音频输入实现对完善的 FM 合成架构的连续控制。首先，我们讨论一组设计约束，这些约束通过标准重构损失简化可微 FM 合成器的频谱优化。接下来，我们介绍 Differentiable DX7 (DDX7)，这是一种轻量级架构，用于根据一组紧凑的参数对乐器声音进行神经 FM 重新合成。我们使用从 URMP 数据集中提取的乐器样本来训练模型，并根据选定的基准定量证明其可比较的音频质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DDX7，一种基于可微分FM合成的轻量级神经网络架构，用于从音频输入中连续控制音乐乐器声音的参数合成。
AI.motivation: 传统FM合成难以从音频源进行控制，而现有DDSP方法在频谱重建时缺乏音高方向信息，导致参数联合优化困难。
AI.method: 通过设计约束优化标准重建损失函数，构建DDX7架构实现紧凑参数的神经FM重合成，并在URMP数据集上训练模型。
AI.result: 在定量评估中，DDX7的音频质量与选定基准相当，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DDX7为从音频输入实现FM合成器的连续控制提供了可行方案，具有良好的音频重建效果。

result: 在定量评估中，DDX7的音频质量与选定基准相当，验证了其有效性。
conclusion: DDX7为从音频输入实现FM合成器的连续控制提供了可行方案，具有良好的音频重建效果。
search_text: DDX7: Differentiable FM Synthesis of Musical Instrument Sounds DDX7：乐器声音的可微 FM 合成 FM Synthesis is a well-known algorithm used to generate complex timbre from a compact set of design primitives. Typically featuring a MIDI interface, it is usually impractical to control it from an audio source. On the other hand, Differentiable Digital Signal Processing (DDSP) has enabled nuanced audio rendering by Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) that learn to control differentiable synthesis layers from arbitrary sound inputs. The training process involves a corpus of audio for supervision, and spectral reconstruction loss functions. Such functions, while being great to match spectral amplitudes, present a lack of pitch direction which can hinder the joint optimization of the parameters of FM synthesizers. In this paper, we take steps towards enabling continuous control of a well-established FM synthesis architecture from an audio input. Firstly, we discuss a set of design constraints that ease spectral optimization of a differentiable FM synthesizer via a standard reconstruction loss. Next, we present Differentiable DX7 (DDX7), a lightweight architecture for neural FM resynthesis of musical instrument sounds in terms of a compact set of parameters. We train the model on instrument samples extracted from the URMP dataset, and quantitatively demonstrate its comparable audio quality against selected benchmarks. FM 合成是一种众所周知的算法，用于从一组紧凑的设计原语生成复杂的音色。通常具有 MIDI 接口，从音频源控制它通常是不切实际的。另一方面，可微分数字信号处理 (DDSP) 通过深度神经网络 (DNN) 实现了细致入微的音频渲染，深度神经网络 (DNN) 学习控制来自任意声音输入的可微分合成层。训练过程涉及用于监督的音频语料库和频谱重建损失函数。这些函数虽然可以很好地匹配频谱幅度，但缺乏音调方向，这可能会阻碍 FM 合成器参数的联合优化。在本文中，我们采取措施从音频输入实现对完善的 FM 合成架构的连续控制。首先，我们讨论一组设计约束，这些约束通过标准重构损失简化可微 FM 合成器的频谱优化。接下来，我们介绍 Differentiable DX7 (DDX7)，这是一种轻量级架构，用于根据一组紧凑的参数对乐器声音进行神经 FM 重新合成。我们使用从 URMP 数据集中提取的乐器样本来训练模型，并根据选定的基准定量证明其可比较的音频质量。 本文提出DDX7，一种基于可微分FM合成的轻量级神经网络架构，用于从音频输入中连续控制音乐乐器声音的参数合成。 Franco Caspe,Andrew McPherson,Mark Sandler cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS,eess.SP

authors_text: Chintan Patel
title: Customer Empowered Privacy-Preserving Secure Verification using Decentralized Identifier and Verifiable Credentials For Product Delivery Using Robots
title_zh: 使用去中心化标识符和可验证凭证进行客户授权的隐私保护安全验证，以使用机器人进行产品交付
abstract: In the age of respiratory illnesses like COVID 19, we understand the necessity for a robot based delivery system to ensure safe and contact free courier delivery. A blockchain based Dynamic IDentifier gives people total power over their identities while preserving auditability and anonymity. A human mobile phone and a robot are machines created with a chip, making it simple to deploy a physical unclonable function based verification system between the robot and the customer. This article presents a novel framework and a first customer verification scheme for verified courier delivery utilizing the blockchain enabled DID and PUF enabled robots. We employ DID for customer authentication between a robot (a service provider) and a customer and PUF for robot verification by the customer. We ve also put the proposed work into practice and demonstrated its capabilities in terms of throughput, latency, computing cost, and communication cost. We also show formal security proof for the proposed user verification scheme based on the tamarin prover.
summary: In the age of respiratory illnesses like COVID 19, we understand the necessity for a robot based delivery system to ensure safe and contact free courier delivery. A blockchain based Dynamic IDentifier gives people total power over their identities while preserving auditability and anonymity. A human mobile phone and a robot are machines created with a chip, making it simple to deploy a physical unclonable function based verification system between the robot and the customer. This article presents a novel framework and a first customer verification scheme for verified courier delivery utilizing the blockchain enabled DID and PUF enabled robots. We employ DID for customer authentication between a robot (a service provider) and a customer and PUF for robot verification by the customer. We ve also put the proposed work into practice and demonstrated its capabilities in terms of throughput, latency, computing cost, and communication cost. We also show formal security proof for the proposed user verification scheme based on the tamarin prover.
abstract_zh: 在像 COVID 19 这样的呼吸道疾病肆虐的时代，我们了解基于机器人的递送系统的必要性，以确保安全和无接触的快递递送。基于区块链的动态标识符赋予人们对其身份的完全控制权，同时保留可审计性和匿名性。人类手机和机器人都是用芯片创建的机器，使得在机器人和客户之间部署基于物理不可克隆功能的验证系统变得简单。本文提出了一种新颖的框架和第一个客户验证方案，用于利用支持区块链的 DID 和 PUF 机器人来验证快递递送。我们使用 DID 在机器人（服务提供商）和客户之间进行客户身份验证，并使用 PUF 进行客户对机器人的验证。我们还将所提出的工作付诸实践，并展示了其在吞吐量、延迟、计算成本和通信成本方面的能力。我们还展示了基于 tamarin 证明者的拟议用户验证方案的正式安全证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于区块链去中心化标识符（DID）和物理不可克隆函数（PUF）的隐私保护安全验证框架，用于机器人产品配送中的客户身份认证与机器人验证。
AI.motivation: 在新冠疫情等呼吸道疾病流行期间，接触式配送存在风险，需通过机器人实现无接触配送，同时保障客户隐私与系统安全性。
AI.method: 结合区块链DID实现客户与机器人之间的身份认证，利用PUF技术实现客户对机器人的物理验证，并通过Tamarin证明器进行形式化安全验证。
AI.result: 实现了该框架的原型系统，验证了其在吞吐量、延迟、计算与通信成本上的可行性，并通过形式化证明确保用户验证方案的安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人配送提供了隐私保护与安全验证的解决方案，平衡了客户自主权、系统审计性与匿名性需求。

authors_text: Daniel Scheliga,Patrick Mäder,Marco Seeland
title: Dropout is NOT All You Need to Prevent Gradient Leakage
title_zh: 防止梯度泄漏所需的不仅仅是 Dropout
comment: 25 pages, 17 figures, 9 tables (supplementary material included)
comments: 25 pages, 17 figures, 9 tables (supplementary material included)
abstract: Gradient inversion attacks on federated learning systems reconstruct client training data from exchanged gradient information. To defend against such attacks, a variety of defense mechanisms were proposed. However, they usually lead to an unacceptable trade-off between privacy and model utility. Recent observations suggest that dropout could mitigate gradient leakage and improve model utility if added to neural networks. Unfortunately, this phenomenon has not been systematically researched yet. In this work, we thoroughly analyze the effect of dropout on iterative gradient inversion attacks. We find that state of the art attacks are not able to reconstruct the client data due to the stochasticity induced by dropout during model training. Nonetheless, we argue that dropout does not offer reliable protection if the dropout induced stochasticity is adequately modeled during attack optimization. Consequently, we propose a novel Dropout Inversion Attack (DIA) that jointly optimizes for client data and dropout masks to approximate the stochastic client model. We conduct an extensive systematic evaluation of our attack on four seminal model architectures and three image classification datasets of increasing complexity. We find that our proposed attack bypasses the protection seemingly induced by dropout and reconstructs client data with high fidelity. Our work demonstrates that privacy inducing changes to model architectures alone cannot be assumed to reliably protect from gradient leakage and therefore should be combined with complementary defense mechanisms.
summary: Gradient inversion attacks on federated learning systems reconstruct client training data from exchanged gradient information. To defend against such attacks, a variety of defense mechanisms were proposed. However, they usually lead to an unacceptable trade-off between privacy and model utility. Recent observations suggest that dropout could mitigate gradient leakage and improve model utility if added to neural networks. Unfortunately, this phenomenon has not been systematically researched yet. In this work, we thoroughly analyze the effect of dropout on iterative gradient inversion attacks. We find that state of the art attacks are not able to reconstruct the client data due to the stochasticity induced by dropout during model training. Nonetheless, we argue that dropout does not offer reliable protection if the dropout induced stochasticity is adequately modeled during attack optimization. Consequently, we propose a novel Dropout Inversion Attack (DIA) that jointly optimizes for client data and dropout masks to approximate the stochastic client model. We conduct an extensive systematic evaluation of our attack on four seminal model architectures and three image classification datasets of increasing complexity. We find that our proposed attack bypasses the protection seemingly induced by dropout and reconstructs client data with high fidelity. Our work demonstrates that privacy inducing changes to model architectures alone cannot be assumed to reliably protect from gradient leakage and therefore should be combined with complementary defense mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 针对联邦学习系统的梯度反转攻击根据交换的梯度信息重建客户端训练数据。为了防御此类攻击，提出了多种防御机制。然而，它们通常会导致隐私和模型效用之间不可接受的权衡。最近的观察表明，如果将 dropout 添加到神经网络中，可以减轻梯度泄漏并提高模型效用。不幸的是，这种现象尚未得到系统的研究。在这项工作中，我们彻底分析了 dropout 对迭代梯度反转攻击的影响。我们发现，由于模型训练期间丢失引起的随机性，最先进的攻击无法重建客户端数据。尽管如此，我们认为，如果在攻击优化期间对丢失引起的随机性进行充分建模，则丢失并不能提供可靠的保护。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的丢弃反转攻击（DIA），它联合优化客户端数据和丢弃掩码以近似随机客户端模型。我们对四个开创性模型架构和三个复杂性不断增加的图像分类数据集的攻击进行了广泛的系统评估。我们发现我们提出的攻击绕过了看似由丢失引起的保护，并以高保真度重建了客户端数据。我们的工作表明，不能假设单独引起模型架构变化的隐私能够可靠地防止梯度泄漏，因此应该与补充防御机制相结合。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Dropout在防止联邦学习中梯度泄露攻击的效果，并提出了一种新型攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 现有防御机制在隐私保护与模型效用间存在权衡，而Dropout被观察到可能缓解梯度泄露但缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 系统评估Dropout对迭代梯度反转攻击的影响，提出联合优化客户端数据和Dropout掩码的Dropout反转攻击（DIA）方法。
AI.result: 实验表明DIA能绕过Dropout的保护机制，在多种模型架构和数据集上高保真重构客户端数据。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖模型结构修改无法可靠防御梯度泄露，需结合其他防御机制。

Our work demonstrates that privacy inducing changes to model architectures alone cannot be assumed to reliably protect from gradient leakage and therefore should be combined with complementary defense mechanisms. 针对联邦学习系统的梯度反转攻击根据交换的梯度信息重建客户端训练数据。为了防御此类攻击，提出了多种防御机制。然而，它们通常会导致隐私和模型效用之间不可接受的权衡。最近的观察表明，如果将 dropout 添加到神经网络中，可以减轻梯度泄漏并提高模型效用。不幸的是，这种现象尚未得到系统的研究。在这项工作中，我们彻底分析了 dropout 对迭代梯度反转攻击的影响。我们发现，由于模型训练期间丢失引起的随机性，最先进的攻击无法重建客户端数据。尽管如此，我们认为，如果在攻击优化期间对丢失引起的随机性进行充分建模，则丢失并不能提供可靠的保护。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的丢弃反转攻击（DIA），它联合优化客户端数据和丢弃掩码以近似随机客户端模型。我们对四个开创性模型架构和三个复杂性不断增加的图像分类数据集的攻击进行了广泛的系统评估。我们发现我们提出的攻击绕过了看似由丢失引起的保护，并以高保真度重建了客户端数据。我们的工作表明，不能假设单独引起模型架构变化的隐私能够可靠地防止梯度泄漏，因此应该与补充防御机制相结合。 本文分析了Dropout在防止联邦学习中梯度泄露攻击的效果，并提出了一种新型攻击方法。 Daniel Scheliga,Patrick Mäder,Marco Seeland cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Jiadong Liang,Wenjie Pei,Feng Lu
title: Layout-Bridging Text-to-Image Synthesis
title_zh: 布局桥接文本到图像的合成
abstract: The crux of text-to-image synthesis stems from the difficulty of preserving the cross-modality semantic consistency between the input text and the synthesized image. Typical methods, which seek to model the text-to-image mapping directly, could only capture keywords in the text that indicates common objects or actions but fail to learn their spatial distribution patterns. An effective way to circumvent this limitation is to generate an image layout as guidance, which is attempted by a few methods. Nevertheless, these methods fail to generate practically effective layouts due to the diversity of input text and object location. In this paper we push for effective modeling in both text-to-layout generation and layout-to-image synthesis. Specifically, we formulate the text-to-layout generation as a sequence-to-sequence modeling task, and build our model upon Transformer to learn the spatial relationships between objects by modeling the sequential dependencies between them. In the stage of layout-to-image synthesis, we focus on learning the textual-visual semantic alignment per object in the layout to precisely incorporate the input text into the layout-to-image synthesizing process. To evaluate the quality of generated layout, we design a new metric specifically, dubbed Layout Quality Score, which considers both the absolute distribution errors of bounding boxes in the layout and the mutual spatial relationships between them. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our method over state-of-the-art methods on both predicting the layout and synthesizing the image from the given text.
summary: The crux of text-to-image synthesis stems from the difficulty of preserving the cross-modality semantic consistency between the input text and the synthesized image. Typical methods, which seek to model the text-to-image mapping directly, could only capture keywords in the text that indicates common objects or actions but fail to learn their spatial distribution patterns. An effective way to circumvent this limitation is to generate an image layout as guidance, which is attempted by a few methods. Nevertheless, these methods fail to generate practically effective layouts due to the diversity of input text and object location. In this paper we push for effective modeling in both text-to-layout generation and layout-to-image synthesis. Specifically, we formulate the text-to-layout generation as a sequence-to-sequence modeling task, and build our model upon Transformer to learn the spatial relationships between objects by modeling the sequential dependencies between them. In the stage of layout-to-image synthesis, we focus on learning the textual-visual semantic alignment per object in the layout to precisely incorporate the input text into the layout-to-image synthesizing process. To evaluate the quality of generated layout, we design a new metric specifically, dubbed Layout Quality Score, which considers both the absolute distribution errors of bounding boxes in the layout and the mutual spatial relationships between them. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our method over state-of-the-art methods on both predicting the layout and synthesizing the image from the given text.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像合成的关键在于难以保持输入文本和合成图像之间的跨模态语义一致性。寻求直接对文本到图像映射进行建模的典型方法只能捕获文本中指示常见对象或动作的关键字，但无法了解其空间分布模式。规避此限制的有效方法是生成图像布局作为指导，这通过几种方法进行了尝试。然而，由于输入文本和对象位置的多样性，这些方法无法生成实际有效的布局。在本文中，我们推动文本到布局生成和布局到图像合成的有效建模。具体来说，我们将文本到布局的生成制定为序列到序列的建模任务，并在 Transformer 上构建模型，通过建模对象之间的顺序依赖关系来学习对象之间的空间关系。在布局到图像合成阶段，我们专注于学习布局中每个对象的文本视觉语义对齐，以将输入文本精确地合并到布局到图像合成过程中。为了评估生成的布局的质量，我们专门设计了一个新的指标，称为布局质量得分，它既考虑了布局中边界框的绝对分布误差，也考虑了它们之间的相互空间关系。对三个数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在预测布局和从给定文本合成图像方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过生成图像布局作为桥梁的文本到图像合成方法，以解决语义一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以捕捉文本中物体的空间分布模式，导致生成布局效果不佳，需通过布局引导提升合成质量。
AI.method: 将文本到布局生成建模为序列到序列任务，基于Transformer学习物体空间关系；在布局到图像合成阶段，通过物体级语义对齐增强文本信息融合，并设计布局质量评分指标。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实验表明，该方法在布局预测和图像合成任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过双阶段布局引导的文本到图像合成方法有效提升了语义一致性和空间布局准确性。

authors_text: Zhonghao Lin,Haihan Duan,Zikai Alex Wen,Wei Cai
title: What Features Influence Impact Feel? A Study of Impact Feedback in Action Games
title_zh: 哪些特征会影响冲击感？动作游戏中影响反馈的研究
comment: Accepted by The IEEE CTSoc International Conference on Games Entertainment & Media 2022 (GEM 2022)
comments: Accepted by The IEEE CTSoc International Conference on Games Entertainment & Media 2022 (GEM 2022)
abstract: Making the hit effect satisfy players is a long-standing problem faced by action game designers. However, no research systematically analyzed which game design elements affect such game feel. There is not even a term to describe it. So, we propose to use impact feel to describe the player's feeling when receiving juicy impact feedback. After collecting player's comments on action games from Steam's top seller list, we trained a natural language processing (NLP) model to rank action games with their performance on impact feel. We presented a 19-feature framework of impact feedback design and examined it in the top eight and last eight games. We listed an inventory of the usage of features and found that hit stop, sound coherence, and camera control may strongly influence players' impact feel. A lack of dedicated design on one of these three features may ruin players' impact feel. Our findings may become an evaluation metric for future studies.
summary: Making the hit effect satisfy players is a long-standing problem faced by action game designers. However, no research systematically analyzed which game design elements affect such game feel. There is not even a term to describe it. So, we propose to use impact feel to describe the player's feeling when receiving juicy impact feedback. After collecting player's comments on action games from Steam's top seller list, we trained a natural language processing (NLP) model to rank action games with their performance on impact feel. We presented a 19-feature framework of impact feedback design and examined it in the top eight and last eight games. We listed an inventory of the usage of features and found that hit stop, sound coherence, and camera control may strongly influence players' impact feel. A lack of dedicated design on one of these three features may ruin players' impact feel. Our findings may become an evaluation metric for future studies.
abstract_zh: 让打击效果让玩家满意是动作游戏设计师长期面临的问题。然而，还没有研究系统地分析哪些游戏设计元素会影响这样的游戏感觉。甚至没有一个术语来描述它。因此，我们建议使用冲击感来描述玩家在收到丰富的冲击反馈时的感受。在从 Steam 畅销榜中收集玩家对动作游戏的评论后，我们训练了一个自然语言处理 (NLP) 模型，根据动作游戏的冲击感表现对动作游戏进行排名。我们提出了一个包含 19 个功能的影响反馈设计框架，并在前八名和最后八名游戏中对其进行了检验。我们列出了功能使用情况的清单，发现点击停止、声音连贯性和镜头控制可能会强烈影响玩家的冲击感。如果这三个功能之一缺乏专门的设计，可能会破坏玩家的冲击感。我们的研究结果可能成为未来研究的评估指标。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动作游戏中影响玩家'冲击感'的设计要素，提出19项特征框架并分析关键因素。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对动作游戏中'冲击反馈'体验的系统分析，也无明确术语描述该体验，需建立评估体系。
AI.method: 通过收集Steam畅销游戏玩家评论，训练NLP模型评估游戏冲击感，并基于前八名与后八名游戏验证19项设计特征。
AI.result: 发现击中暂停、音效协调性、摄像机控制三个特征对冲击感影响最大，缺失任一特征会显著降低体验。
AI.conclusion: 冲击感设计需重点关注击中暂停、音效协调性和摄像机控制，为未来游戏设计提供评估指标。

authors_text: Brandon Yushan Feng,Yinda Zhang,Danhang Tang,Ruofei Du,Amitabh Varshney
title: PRIF: Primary Ray-based Implicit Function
title_zh: PRIF：主要基于射线的隐式函数
comment: ECCV 2022. Project Page: https://augmentariumlab.github.io/PRIF/
comments: ECCV 2022. Project Page: https://augmentariumlab.github.io/PRIF/
abstract: We introduce a new implicit shape representation called Primary Ray-based Implicit Function (PRIF). In contrast to most existing approaches based on the signed distance function (SDF) which handles spatial locations, our representation operates on oriented rays. Specifically, PRIF is formulated to directly produce the surface hit point of a given input ray, without the expensive sphere-tracing operations, hence enabling efficient shape extraction and differentiable rendering. We demonstrate that neural networks trained to encode PRIF achieve successes in various tasks including single shape representation, category-wise shape generation, shape completion from sparse or noisy observations, inverse rendering for camera pose estimation, and neural rendering with color.
summary: We introduce a new implicit shape representation called Primary Ray-based Implicit Function (PRIF). In contrast to most existing approaches based on the signed distance function (SDF) which handles spatial locations, our representation operates on oriented rays. Specifically, PRIF is formulated to directly produce the surface hit point of a given input ray, without the expensive sphere-tracing operations, hence enabling efficient shape extraction and differentiable rendering. We demonstrate that neural networks trained to encode PRIF achieve successes in various tasks including single shape representation, category-wise shape generation, shape completion from sparse or noisy observations, inverse rendering for camera pose estimation, and neural rendering with color.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新的隐式形状表示，称为基于主射线的隐式函数（PRIF）。与大多数基于处理空间位置的符号距离函数（SDF）的现有方法相比，我们的表示方法在定向光线上运行。具体来说，PRIF 被制定为直接生成给定输入光线的表面击中点，无需昂贵的球体追踪操作，从而实现高效的形状提取和可微分渲染。我们证明，经过训练来编码 PRIF 的神经网络在各种任务中取得了成功，包括单一形状表示、按类别生成形状、稀疏或噪声观测的形状完成、相机姿态估计的逆渲染以及颜色神经渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主射线的隐式函数（PRIF），通过直接预测射线与表面的交点，实现高效形状表示与可微渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统隐式形状表示依赖符号距离函数（SDF）和耗时的球面追踪操作，而PRIF通过处理有向射线直接获取交点，避免了高计算成本。
AI.method: PRIF利用神经网络直接编码射线参数，输出对应表面交点，无需球面追踪，支持高效形状提取与可微渲染。
AI.result: 实验表明，PRIF在单形状表示、类别生成、稀疏观测补全、相机姿态估计及带颜色的神经渲染任务中均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: PRIF为隐式形状表示提供了高效且灵活的新方法，在多种视觉任务中展现出广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: PRIF: Primary Ray-based Implicit Function PRIF：主要基于射线的隐式函数 We introduce a new implicit shape representation called Primary Ray-based Implicit Function (PRIF). In contrast to most existing approaches based on the signed distance function (SDF) which handles spatial locations, our representation operates on oriented rays. Specifically, PRIF is formulated to directly produce the surface hit point of a given input ray, without the expensive sphere-tracing operations, hence enabling efficient shape extraction and differentiable rendering. We demonstrate that neural networks trained to encode PRIF achieve successes in various tasks including single shape representation, category-wise shape generation, shape completion from sparse or noisy observations, inverse rendering for camera pose estimation, and neural rendering with color. 我们引入了一种新的隐式形状表示，称为基于主射线的隐式函数（PRIF）。与大多数基于处理空间位置的符号距离函数（SDF）的现有方法相比，我们的表示方法在定向光线上运行。具体来说，PRIF 被制定为直接生成给定输入光线的表面击中点，无需昂贵的球体追踪操作，从而实现高效的形状提取和可微分渲染。我们证明，经过训练来编码 PRIF 的神经网络在各种任务中取得了成功，包括单一形状表示、按类别生成形状、稀疏或噪声观测的形状完成、相机姿态估计的逆渲染以及颜色神经渲染。 本文提出一种基于主射线的隐式函数（PRIF），通过直接预测射线与表面的交点，实现高效形状表示与可微渲染。 Brandon Yushan Feng,Yinda Zhang,Danhang Tang,Ruofei Du,Amitabh Varshney cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhiyu Jin,Xuli Shen,Bin Li,Xiangyang Xue
title: Style Spectroscope: Improve Interpretability and Controllability through Fourier Analysis
title_zh: 风格光谱仪：通过傅立叶分析提高可解释性和可控性
comment: 10 pages; 4 figures; the results will be updated in the following version
comments: 10 pages; 4 figures; the results will be updated in the following version
abstract: Universal style transfer (UST) infuses styles from arbitrary reference images into content images. Existing methods, while enjoying many practical successes, are unable of explaining experimental observations, including different performances of UST algorithms in preserving the spatial structure of content images. In addition, methods are limited to cumbersome global controls on stylization, so that they require additional spatial masks for desired stylization. In this work, we provide a systematic Fourier analysis on a general framework for UST. We present an equivalent form of the framework in the frequency domain. The form implies that existing algorithms treat all frequency components and pixels of feature maps equally, except for the zero-frequency component. We connect Fourier amplitude and phase with Gram matrices and a content reconstruction loss in style transfer, respectively. Based on such equivalence and connections, we can thus interpret different structure preservation behaviors between algorithms with Fourier phase. Given the interpretations we have, we propose two manipulations in practice for structure preservation and desired stylization. Both qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the competitive performance of our method against the state-of-the-art methods. We also conduct experiments to demonstrate (1) the abovementioned equivalence, (2) the interpretability based on Fourier amplitude and phase and (3) the controllability associated with frequency components.
summary: Universal style transfer (UST) infuses styles from arbitrary reference images into content images. Existing methods, while enjoying many practical successes, are unable of explaining experimental observations, including different performances of UST algorithms in preserving the spatial structure of content images. In addition, methods are limited to cumbersome global controls on stylization, so that they require additional spatial masks for desired stylization. In this work, we provide a systematic Fourier analysis on a general framework for UST. We present an equivalent form of the framework in the frequency domain. The form implies that existing algorithms treat all frequency components and pixels of feature maps equally, except for the zero-frequency component. We connect Fourier amplitude and phase with Gram matrices and a content reconstruction loss in style transfer, respectively. Based on such equivalence and connections, we can thus interpret different structure preservation behaviors between algorithms with Fourier phase. Given the interpretations we have, we propose two manipulations in practice for structure preservation and desired stylization. Both qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the competitive performance of our method against the state-of-the-art methods. We also conduct experiments to demonstrate (1) the abovementioned equivalence, (2) the interpretability based on Fourier amplitude and phase and (3) the controllability associated with frequency components.
abstract_zh: 通用风格迁移 (UST) 将任意参考图像的风格注入到内容图像中。现有方法虽然取得了许多实际成功，但无法解释实验观察结果，包括 UST 算法在保留内容图像的空间结构方面的不同性能。此外，这些方法仅限于对风格化进行繁琐的全局控制，因此它们需要额外的空间掩模来实现所需的风格化。在这项工作中，我们对 UST 的总体框架进行了系统的傅里叶分析。我们在频域中提出了该框架的等效形式。该形式意味着现有算法平等地对待特征图的所有频率分量和像素，除了零频率分量之外。我们将傅立叶振幅和相位分别与格拉姆矩阵和风格迁移中的内容重建损失联系起来。基于这种等价性和联系，我们可以解释具有傅里叶相位的算法之间不同的结构保持行为。鉴于我们的解释，我们在实践中提出了两种操作来保存结构和所需的风格化。定性和定量实验都证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的竞争性能。我们还进行了实验来证明（1）上述等价性，（2）基于傅里叶幅度和相位的可解释性以及（3）与频率分量相关的可控性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过傅里叶分析改进通用风格迁移（UST）的可解释性和可控性，提出了一种基于频率域的框架解释方法，并设计了结构保持和风格控制的实践操作。
AI.motivation: 现有UST方法无法解释不同算法在保留内容图像空间结构上的性能差异，且依赖繁琐的全局控制，需额外空间掩码实现目标风格化。
AI.method: 在频率域建立UST框架等效形式，揭示现有算法对特征图所有频率分量和像素平等处理（除零频分量）。通过傅里叶幅度与相位分别关联Gram矩阵和内容重建损失，提出基于频率成分的结构保持与风格控制方法。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在保持结构和风格化效果上优于现有技术，验证了频率域等效性、基于傅里叶的可解释性及频率成分可控性。
AI.conclusion: 傅里叶分析为UST提供了系统性解释框架，通过频率域操作可同时提升模型可解释性与用户对风格迁移过程的精细控制能力。

authors_text: Matt-Heun Hong,Lauren A. Marsh,Jessica L. Feuston,Janet Ruppert,Jed R. Brubaker,Danielle Albers Szafir
title: Scholastic: Graphical Human-Al Collaboration for Inductive and Interpretive Text Analysis
title_zh: Scholastic：用于归纳和解释文本分析的图形化人机协作
comment: To appear at the 2022 ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology (UIST '22)
comments: To appear at the 2022 ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology (UIST '22)
abstract: Interpretive scholars generate knowledge from text corpora by manually sampling documents, applying codes, and refining and collating codes into categories until meaningful themes emerge. Given a large corpus, machine learning could help scale this data sampling and analysis, but prior research shows that experts are generally concerned about algorithms potentially disrupting or driving interpretive scholarship. We take a human-centered design approach to addressing concerns around machine-assisted interpretive research to build Scholastic, which incorporates a machine-in-the-loop clustering algorithm to scaffold interpretive text analysis. As a scholar applies codes to documents and refines them, the resulting coding schema serves as structured metadata which constrains hierarchical document and word clusters inferred from the corpus. Interactive visualizations of these clusters can help scholars strategically sample documents further toward insights. Scholastic demonstrates how human-centered algorithm design and visualizations employing familiar metaphors can support inductive and interpretive research methodologies through interactive topic modeling and document clustering.
summary: Interpretive scholars generate knowledge from text corpora by manually sampling documents, applying codes, and refining and collating codes into categories until meaningful themes emerge. Given a large corpus, machine learning could help scale this data sampling and analysis, but prior research shows that experts are generally concerned about algorithms potentially disrupting or driving interpretive scholarship. We take a human-centered design approach to addressing concerns around machine-assisted interpretive research to build Scholastic, which incorporates a machine-in-the-loop clustering algorithm to scaffold interpretive text analysis. As a scholar applies codes to documents and refines them, the resulting coding schema serves as structured metadata which constrains hierarchical document and word clusters inferred from the corpus. Interactive visualizations of these clusters can help scholars strategically sample documents further toward insights. Scholastic demonstrates how human-centered algorithm design and visualizations employing familiar metaphors can support inductive and interpretive research methodologies through interactive topic modeling and document clustering.
abstract_zh: 解释学者通过手动采样文档、应用代码、提炼代码并将其整理为类别，从文本语料库中生成知识，直到出现有意义的主题。考虑到一个庞大的语料库，机器学习可以帮助扩大数据采样和分析的规模，但先前的研究表明，专家普遍担心算法可能会破坏或推动解释性学术研究。我们采用以人为本的设计方法来解决机器辅助解释研究的问题，以构建 Scholastic，它结合了机器在环聚类算法来支撑解释文本分析。当学者将代码应用于文档并对其进行提炼时，生成的编码模式将作为结构化元数据，约束从语料库推断出的分层文档和词簇。这些集群的交互式可视化可以帮助学者战略性地对文档进行采样，以进一步获得见解。 Scholastic 展示了以人为中心的算法设计和使用熟悉的隐喻的可视化如何通过交互式主题建模和文档聚类来支持归纳和解释性研究方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Scholastic系统，通过人机协作的图示化方法支持归纳与解释性文本分析。
AI.motivation: 传统解释性研究依赖人工处理文本数据效率低，而机器学习虽能扩展分析能力，但学者担忧算法可能干扰研究过程。
AI.method: 设计包含机器学习聚类算法的交互式系统，利用学者编码生成结构化元数据约束文本聚类，并通过可视化辅助文档抽样。
AI.result: Scholastic验证了人机协作设计能有效提升文本分析效率，同时保持学者对研究过程的控制与解释能力。
AI.conclusion: 以人为中心的算法设计与可视化工具可有效融合机器学习与解释性研究方法，为文本分析提供新范式。

search_text: Scholastic: Graphical Human-Al Collaboration for Inductive and Interpretive Text Analysis Scholastic：用于归纳和解释文本分析的图形化人机协作 Interpretive scholars generate knowledge from text corpora by manually sampling documents, applying codes, and refining and collating codes into categories until meaningful themes emerge. Given a large corpus, machine learning could help scale this data sampling and analysis, but prior research shows that experts are generally concerned about algorithms potentially disrupting or driving interpretive scholarship. We take a human-centered design approach to addressing concerns around machine-assisted interpretive research to build Scholastic, which incorporates a machine-in-the-loop clustering algorithm to scaffold interpretive text analysis. As a scholar applies codes to documents and refines them, the resulting coding schema serves as structured metadata which constrains hierarchical document and word clusters inferred from the corpus. Interactive visualizations of these clusters can help scholars strategically sample documents further toward insights. Scholastic demonstrates how human-centered algorithm design and visualizations employing familiar metaphors can support inductive and interpretive research methodologies through interactive topic modeling and document clustering. 解释学者通过手动采样文档、应用代码、提炼代码并将其整理为类别，从文本语料库中生成知识，直到出现有意义的主题。考虑到一个庞大的语料库，机器学习可以帮助扩大数据采样和分析的规模，但先前的研究表明，专家普遍担心算法可能会破坏或推动解释性学术研究。我们采用以人为本的设计方法来解决机器辅助解释研究的问题，以构建 Scholastic，它结合了机器在环聚类算法来支撑解释文本分析。当学者将代码应用于文档并对其进行提炼时，生成的编码模式将作为结构化元数据，约束从语料库推断出的分层文档和词簇。这些集群的交互式可视化可以帮助学者战略性地对文档进行采样，以进一步获得见解。 Scholastic 展示了以人为中心的算法设计和使用熟悉的隐喻的可视化如何通过交互式主题建模和文档聚类来支持归纳和解释性研究方法。 本文提出Scholastic系统，通过人机协作的图示化方法支持归纳与解释性文本分析。 Matt-Heun Hong,Lauren A. Marsh,Jessica L. Feuston,Janet Ruppert,Jed R. Brubaker,Danielle Albers Szafir cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Pengyang Yu,Chaofan Fu,Yanwei Yu,Chao Huang,Zhongying Zhao,Junyu Dong
title: Multiplex Heterogeneous Graph Convolutional Network
title_zh: 多重异构图卷积网络
abstract: Heterogeneous graph convolutional networks have gained great popularity in tackling various network analytical tasks on heterogeneous network data, ranging from link prediction to node classification. However, most existing works ignore the relation heterogeneity with multiplex network between multi-typed nodes and different importance of relations in meta-paths for node embedding, which can hardly capture the heterogeneous structure signals across different relations. To tackle this challenge, this work proposes a Multiplex Heterogeneous Graph Convolutional Network (MHGCN) for heterogeneous network embedding. Our MHGCN can automatically learn the useful heterogeneous meta-path interactions of different lengths in multiplex heterogeneous networks through multi-layer convolution aggregation. Additionally, we effectively integrate both multi-relation structural signals and attribute semantics into the learned node embeddings with both unsupervised and semi-supervised learning paradigms. Extensive experiments on five real-world datasets with various network analytical tasks demonstrate the significant superiority of MHGCN against state-of-the-art embedding baselines in terms of all evaluation metrics.
summary: Heterogeneous graph convolutional networks have gained great popularity in tackling various network analytical tasks on heterogeneous network data, ranging from link prediction to node classification. However, most existing works ignore the relation heterogeneity with multiplex network between multi-typed nodes and different importance of relations in meta-paths for node embedding, which can hardly capture the heterogeneous structure signals across different relations. To tackle this challenge, this work proposes a Multiplex Heterogeneous Graph Convolutional Network (MHGCN) for heterogeneous network embedding. Our MHGCN can automatically learn the useful heterogeneous meta-path interactions of different lengths in multiplex heterogeneous networks through multi-layer convolution aggregation. Additionally, we effectively integrate both multi-relation structural signals and attribute semantics into the learned node embeddings with both unsupervised and semi-supervised learning paradigms. Extensive experiments on five real-world datasets with various network analytical tasks demonstrate the significant superiority of MHGCN against state-of-the-art embedding baselines in terms of all evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 异构图卷积网络在处理异构网络数据的各种网络分析任务（从链路预测到节点分类）方面广受欢迎。然而，大多数现有工作忽略了多类型节点之间多路复用网络的关系异构性以及节点嵌入元路径中关系的不同重要性，很难捕获跨不同关系的异构结构信号。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作提出了一种用于异构网络嵌入的多重异构图卷积网络（MHGCN）。我们的 MHGCN 可以通过多层卷积聚合自动学习多路异构网络中不同长度的有用异构元路径交互。此外，我们通过无监督和半监督学习范式有效地将多关系结构信号和属性语义集成到学习的节点嵌入中。对具有各种网络分析任务的五个现实数据集进行的广泛实验证明，在所有评估指标方面，MHGCN 相对于最先进的嵌入基线具有显着优势。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多路异构图卷积网络（MHGCN）用于异构网络嵌入，以解决现有方法在捕捉异质结构信号方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效捕捉异构网络中不同关系的异质结构信号及元路径的重要性，限制了节点嵌入的效果。
AI.method: 提出多层卷积聚合机制，自动学习不同长度的异质元路径交互，并融合多关系结构信号与属性语义，采用无监督和半监督学习范式进行节点嵌入。
AI.result: 在五个真实数据集上的实验表明，MHGCN在多个评估指标上显著优于现有最先进的嵌入方法。
AI.conclusion: MHGCN通过有效整合多关系结构信号与属性语义，显著提升了异构网络嵌入性能，验证了其在多种任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Peiran Yan,Shengchen Li
title: An investigation on selecting audio pre-trained models for audio captioning
title_zh: 选择用于音频字幕的音频预训练模型的研究
comment: 5 pages, 7 figures
comments: 5 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Audio captioning is a task that generates description of audio based on content. Pre-trained models are widely used in audio captioning due to high complexity. Unless a comprehensive system is re-trained, it is hard to determine how well pre-trained models contribute to audio captioning system. To prevent the time consuming and energy consuming process of retraining, it is necessary to propose a preditor of performance for the pre-trained model in audio captioning. In this paper, a series of pre-trained models are investigated for the correlation between extracted audio features and the performance of audio captioning. A couple of predictor is proposed based on the experiment results.The result demonstrates that the kurtosis and skewness of audio features extracted may act as an indicator of the performance of audio captioning systems for pre-trained audio due to the high correlation between kurtosis and skewness of audio features and the performance of audio captioning systems.
summary: Audio captioning is a task that generates description of audio based on content. Pre-trained models are widely used in audio captioning due to high complexity. Unless a comprehensive system is re-trained, it is hard to determine how well pre-trained models contribute to audio captioning system. To prevent the time consuming and energy consuming process of retraining, it is necessary to propose a preditor of performance for the pre-trained model in audio captioning. In this paper, a series of pre-trained models are investigated for the correlation between extracted audio features and the performance of audio captioning. A couple of predictor is proposed based on the experiment results.The result demonstrates that the kurtosis and skewness of audio features extracted may act as an indicator of the performance of audio captioning systems for pre-trained audio due to the high correlation between kurtosis and skewness of audio features and the performance of audio captioning systems.
abstract_zh: 音频字幕是一项根据内容生成音频描述的任务。由于复杂性高，预训练模型广泛用于音频字幕。除非重新训练一个综合系统，否则很难确定预训练模型对音频字幕系统的贡献有多大。为了防止重新训练的耗时和耗能过程，有必要为音频字幕中的预训练模型提出性能预测器。在本文中，研究了一系列预训练模型，以研究提取的音频特征与音频字幕性能之间的相关性。基于实验结果提出了几个预测器。结果表明，由于音频特征的峰度和偏度与音频字幕系统的性能之间存在高度相关性，因此提取的音频特征的峰度和偏度可以作为预训练音频的音频字幕系统性能的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过分析音频特征选择预训练模型以提升音频描述生成效果。
AI.motivation: 由于重新训练完整系统耗时耗能，需提出一种无需重新训练即可预测预训练模型在音频描述任务中表现的方法。
AI.method: 通过实验分析多种预训练模型，提取音频特征并建立预测指标，重点考察峰度和偏度与模型性能的相关性。
AI.result: 实验表明音频特征的峰度和偏度与音频描述系统性能存在显著相关性，可作为性能预测指标。
AI.conclusion: 音频特征的统计特性（峰度和偏度）可有效指示预训练模型在音频描述任务中的表现，为模型选择提供依据。

authors_text: Zhongyan Zhang,Lei Wang,Yang Wang,Luping Zhou,Jianjia Zhang,Peng Wang,Fang Chen
title: Instance Image Retrieval by Learning Purely From Within the Dataset
title_zh: 通过纯粹从数据集中学习来检索实例图像
abstract: Quality feature representation is key to instance image retrieval. To attain it, existing methods usually resort to a deep model pre-trained on benchmark datasets or even fine-tune the model with a task-dependent labelled auxiliary dataset. Although achieving promising results, this approach is restricted by two issues: 1) the domain gap between benchmark datasets and the dataset of a given retrieval task; 2) the required auxiliary dataset cannot be readily obtained. In light of this situation, this work looks into a different approach which has not been well investigated for instance image retrieval previously: {can we learn feature representation \textit{specific to} a given retrieval task in order to achieve excellent retrieval?} Our finding is encouraging. By adding an object proposal generator to generate image regions for self-supervised learning, the investigated approach can successfully learn feature representation specific to a given dataset for retrieval. This representation can be made even more effective by boosting it with image similarity information mined from the dataset. As experimentally validated, such a simple ``self-supervised learning + self-boosting'' approach can well compete with the relevant state-of-the-art retrieval methods. Ablation study is conducted to show the appealing properties of this approach and its limitation on generalisation across datasets.
summary: Quality feature representation is key to instance image retrieval. To attain it, existing methods usually resort to a deep model pre-trained on benchmark datasets or even fine-tune the model with a task-dependent labelled auxiliary dataset. Although achieving promising results, this approach is restricted by two issues: 1) the domain gap between benchmark datasets and the dataset of a given retrieval task; 2) the required auxiliary dataset cannot be readily obtained. In light of this situation, this work looks into a different approach which has not been well investigated for instance image retrieval previously: {can we learn feature representation \textit{specific to} a given retrieval task in order to achieve excellent retrieval?} Our finding is encouraging. By adding an object proposal generator to generate image regions for self-supervised learning, the investigated approach can successfully learn feature representation specific to a given dataset for retrieval. This representation can be made even more effective by boosting it with image similarity information mined from the dataset. As experimentally validated, such a simple ``self-supervised learning + self-boosting'' approach can well compete with the relevant state-of-the-art retrieval methods. Ablation study is conducted to show the appealing properties of this approach and its limitation on generalisation across datasets.
abstract_zh: 质量特征表示是实例图像检索的关键。为了实现这一目标，现有方法通常采用在基准数据集上预先训练的深度模型，甚至使用依赖于任务的标记辅助数据集来微调模型。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但这种方法受到两个问题的限制：1）基准数据集和给定检索任务的数据集之间的域差距； 2）无法轻易获得所需的辅助数据集。鉴于这种情况，这项工作研究了一种不同的方法，这种方法之前没有被很好地研究过用于图像检索：{我们可以学习特定于给定检索任务的特征表示\textit{以实现出色的检索吗？}我们的发现是令人鼓舞的。通过添加对象提议生成器来生成用于自监督学习的图像区域，所研究的方法可以成功学习特定于给定数据集的特征表示以进行检索。通过使用从数据集中挖掘的图像相似性信息来增强这种表示，可以使这种表示更加有效。经过实验验证，这种简单的“自我监督学习+自我提升”方法可以很好地与相关最先进的检索方法竞争。进行消融研究是为了展示这种方法的吸引人的特性及其在跨数据集泛化方面的局限性。

AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预训练模型或辅助数据集，存在领域差异和数据获取困难的问题。
AI.method: 通过添加对象提议生成器进行自监督学习，并利用数据集内图像相似性信息增强特征表示。
AI.result: 该方法在实验中能有效竞争现有先进方法，消融实验证明其有效性及跨数据集泛化局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在特定数据集上表现优异，但跨数据集泛化能力有限，为无监督学习提供新思路。

search_text: Instance Image Retrieval by Learning Purely From Within the Dataset 通过纯粹从数据集中学习来检索实例图像 Quality feature representation is key to instance image retrieval. To attain it, existing methods usually resort to a deep model pre-trained on benchmark datasets or even fine-tune the model with a task-dependent labelled auxiliary dataset. Although achieving promising results, this approach is restricted by two issues: 1) the domain gap between benchmark datasets and the dataset of a given retrieval task; 2) the required auxiliary dataset cannot be readily obtained. In light of this situation, this work looks into a different approach which has not been well investigated for instance image retrieval previously: {can we learn feature representation \textit{specific to} a given retrieval task in order to achieve excellent retrieval?} Our finding is encouraging. By adding an object proposal generator to generate image regions for self-supervised learning, the investigated approach can successfully learn feature representation specific to a given dataset for retrieval. This representation can be made even more effective by boosting it with image similarity information mined from the dataset. As experimentally validated, such a simple ``self-supervised learning + self-boosting'' approach can well compete with the relevant state-of-the-art retrieval methods. Ablation study is conducted to show the appealing properties of this approach and its limitation on generalisation across datasets. 质量特征表示是实例图像检索的关键。为了实现这一目标，现有方法通常采用在基准数据集上预先训练的深度模型，甚至使用依赖于任务的标记辅助数据集来微调模型。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但这种方法受到两个问题的限制：1）基准数据集和给定检索任务的数据集之间的域差距； 2）无法轻易获得所需的辅助数据集。鉴于这种情况，这项工作研究了一种不同的方法，这种方法之前没有被很好地研究过用于图像检索：{我们可以学习特定于给定检索任务的特征表示\textit{以实现出色的检索吗？}我们的发现是令人鼓舞的。通过添加对象提议生成器来生成用于自监督学习的图像区域，所研究的方法可以成功学习特定于给定数据集的特征表示以进行检索。通过使用从数据集中挖掘的图像相似性信息来增强这种表示，可以使这种表示更加有效。经过实验验证，这种简单的“自我监督学习+自我提升”方法可以很好地与相关最先进的检索方法竞争。进行消融研究是为了展示这种方法的吸引人的特性及其在跨数据集泛化方面的局限性。 本文提出了一种仅从数据集中学习特定特征表示的方法，用于实例图像检索。 Zhongyan Zhang,Lei Wang,Yang Wang,Luping Zhou,Jianjia Zhang,Peng Wang,Fang Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Khang Nhut Lam,Kim-Ngoc Thi Nguyen,Loc Huu Nguy,Jugal Kalita
title: Facial Expression Recognition and Image Description Generation in Vietnamese
title_zh: 越南语面部表情识别和图像描述生成
comment: 7 pages
comments: 7 pages
abstract: This paper discusses a facial expression recognition model and a description generation model to build descriptive sentences for images and facial expressions of people in images. Our study shows that YOLOv5 achieves better results than a traditional CNN for all emotions on the KDEF dataset. In particular, the accuracies of the CNN and YOLOv5 models for emotion recognition are 0.853 and 0.938, respectively. A model for generating descriptions for images based on a merged architecture is proposed using VGG16 with the descriptions encoded over an LSTM model. YOLOv5 is also used to recognize dominant colors of objects in the images and correct the color words in the descriptions generated if it is necessary. If the description contains words referring to a person, we recognize the emotion of the person in the image. Finally, we combine the results of all models to create sentences that describe the visual content and the human emotions in the images. Experimental results on the Flickr8k dataset in Vietnamese achieve BLEU-1, BLEU-2, BLEU-3, BLEU-4 scores of 0.628; 0.425; 0.280; and 0.174, respectively.
summary: This paper discusses a facial expression recognition model and a description generation model to build descriptive sentences for images and facial expressions of people in images. Our study shows that YOLOv5 achieves better results than a traditional CNN for all emotions on the KDEF dataset. In particular, the accuracies of the CNN and YOLOv5 models for emotion recognition are 0.853 and 0.938, respectively. A model for generating descriptions for images based on a merged architecture is proposed using VGG16 with the descriptions encoded over an LSTM model. YOLOv5 is also used to recognize dominant colors of objects in the images and correct the color words in the descriptions generated if it is necessary. If the description contains words referring to a person, we recognize the emotion of the person in the image. Finally, we combine the results of all models to create sentences that describe the visual content and the human emotions in the images. Experimental results on the Flickr8k dataset in Vietnamese achieve BLEU-1, BLEU-2, BLEU-3, BLEU-4 scores of 0.628; 0.425; 0.280; and 0.174, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了面部表情识别模型和描述生成模型，以构建图像和图像中人的面部表情的描述性句子。我们的研究表明，对于 KDEF 数据集上的所有情绪，YOLOv5 都比传统 CNN 取得了更好的结果。特别是，CNN 和 YOLOv5 模型的情感识别准确率分别为 0.853 和 0.938。提出了一种基于合并架构生成图像描述的模型，该模型使用 VGG16 以及通过 LSTM 模型编码的描述。 YOLOv5还用于识别图像中物体的主色，并在必要时纠正生成的描述中的颜色词。如果描述中包含涉及某个人的词语，我们就会识别出图像中该人的情感。最后，我们结合所有模型的结果来创建描述图像中的视觉内容和人类情感的句子。在越南语Flickr8k数据集上的实验结果达到BLEU-1、BLEU-2、BLEU-3、BLEU-4得分为0.628； 0.425； 0.280；和0.174，分别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合面部表情识别和图像描述生成的模型，用于生成包含越南语图像内容及人物情绪的描述性句子。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在表情识别任务中存在局限性，且现有图像描述生成模型较少针对越南语场景进行优化，需提升多模态信息融合效果。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv5进行表情识别和物体主色检测，结合VGG16与LSTM架构生成图像描述，并通过多模型结果融合生成包含情绪信息的完整描述。
AI.result: 在KDEF数据集上YOLOv5表情识别准确率达0.938（优于CNN的0.853），越南语Flickr8k数据集上BLEU-1至BLEU-4得分分别为0.628、0.425、0.280、0.174。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv5在表情识别任务中表现优异，多模型融合方法有效提升了越南语图像描述生成的质量与情绪信息准确性。

authors_text: Rohan Sangameswaran
title: MAIScope: A low-cost portable microscope with built-in vision AI to automate microscopic diagnosis of diseases in remote rural settings
title_zh: MAIScope：一款内置视觉人工智能的低成本便携式显微镜，可在偏远农村地区自动进行疾病的显微诊断
comment: 15 pages, 11 figures
comments: 15 pages, 11 figures
abstract: According to the World Health Organization(WHO), malaria is estimated to have killed 627,000 people and infected over 241 million people in 2020 alone, a 12% increase from 2019. Microscopic diagnosis of blood cells is the standard testing procedure to diagnose malaria. However, this style of diagnosis is expensive, time-consuming, and greatly subjective to human error, especially in developing nations that lack well-trained personnel to perform high-quality microscopy examinations. This paper proposes Mass-AI-Scope (MAIScope): a novel, low-cost, portable device that can take microscopic images and automatically detect malaria parasites with embedded AI. The device has two subsystems. The first subsystem is an on-device multi-layered deep learning network, that detects red blood cells (RBCs) from microscopic images, followed by a malaria parasite classifier that recognizes malaria parasites in the individual RBCs. The testing and validation demonstrated a high average accuracy of 89.9% for classification and average precision of 61.5% for detection models using TensorFlow Lite while addressing limited storage and computational capacity. This system also has cloud synchronization, which sends images to the cloud when connected to the Internet for analysis and model improvement purposes. The second subsystem is the hardware which consists of components like Raspberry Pi, a camera, a touch screen display, and an innovative low-cost bead microscope. Evaluation of the bead microscope demonstrated similar image quality with that of expensive light microscopes. The device is designed to be portable and work in remote environments without the Internet or power. The solution is extensible to other diseases requiring microscopy and can help standardize automation of disease diagnosis in rural parts of developing nations.
summary: According to the World Health Organization(WHO), malaria is estimated to have killed 627,000 people and infected over 241 million people in 2020 alone, a 12% increase from 2019. Microscopic diagnosis of blood cells is the standard testing procedure to diagnose malaria. However, this style of diagnosis is expensive, time-consuming, and greatly subjective to human error, especially in developing nations that lack well-trained personnel to perform high-quality microscopy examinations. This paper proposes Mass-AI-Scope (MAIScope): a novel, low-cost, portable device that can take microscopic images and automatically detect malaria parasites with embedded AI. The device has two subsystems. The first subsystem is an on-device multi-layered deep learning network, that detects red blood cells (RBCs) from microscopic images, followed by a malaria parasite classifier that recognizes malaria parasites in the individual RBCs. The testing and validation demonstrated a high average accuracy of 89.9% for classification and average precision of 61.5% for detection models using TensorFlow Lite while addressing limited storage and computational capacity. This system also has cloud synchronization, which sends images to the cloud when connected to the Internet for analysis and model improvement purposes. The second subsystem is the hardware which consists of components like Raspberry Pi, a camera, a touch screen display, and an innovative low-cost bead microscope. Evaluation of the bead microscope demonstrated similar image quality with that of expensive light microscopes. The device is designed to be portable and work in remote environments without the Internet or power. The solution is extensible to other diseases requiring microscopy and can help standardize automation of disease diagnosis in rural parts of developing nations.
abstract_zh: 据世界卫生组织 (WHO) 统计，仅 2020 年，疟疾估计就导致 627,000 人死亡，感染人数超过 2.41 亿，比 2019 年增加 12%。血细胞显微诊断是诊断疟疾的标准检测程序。然而，这种诊断方式昂贵、耗时，并且很容易受到人为错误的影响，特别是在缺乏训练有素的人员来进行高质量显微镜检查的发展中国家。本文提出了 Mass-AI-Scope (MAIScope)：一种新型、低成本、便携式设备，可以拍摄显微图像并通过嵌入式人工智能自动检测疟疾寄生虫。该设备有两个子系统。第一个子系统是设备上的多层深度学习网络，它从显微图像中检测红细胞 (RBC)，然后是疟疾寄生虫分类器，用于识别单个红细胞中的疟疾寄生虫。测试和验证表明，使用 TensorFlow Lite 的分类平均准确度高达 89.9%，检测模型的平均准确度高达 61.5%，同时解决了存储和计算能力有限的问题。该系统还具有云同步功能，可在连接到互联网时将图像发送到云端，以进行分析和模型改进。第二个子系统是硬件，由 Raspberry Pi、摄像头、触摸屏显示器和创新的低成本珠显微镜等组件组成。珠显微镜的评估表明其图像质量与昂贵的光学显微镜相似。该设备设计为便携式，可以在没有互联网或电源的远程环境中工作。该解决方案可扩展到需要显微镜检查的其他疾病，并有助于发展中国家农村地区疾病诊断的自动化标准化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAIScope，一种低成本便携式显微镜，内置AI用于自动化检测疟疾等疾病，适用于偏远农村地区。
AI.motivation: 传统显微镜诊断疟疾成本高、耗时且依赖人工，易出错；发展中国家缺乏专业人员，疟疾感染和死亡人数居高不下。
AI.method: 设计包含AI视觉系统的硬件设备，使用Raspberry Pi、低成本珠光显微镜及TensorFlow Lite实现RBC检测与疟疾分类；支持离线操作及云同步优化模型。
AI.result: 分类准确率达89.9%，检测精确率为61.5%；珠光显微镜图像质量接近高端设备，设备可在无网络/电力环境下运行。
AI.conclusion: MAIScope为偏远地区提供自动化诊断方案，可扩展至其他疾病，有助于提升发展中国家疾病筛查的标准化与可及性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MAIScope，一种低成本便携式显微镜，内置AI用于自动化检测疟疾等疾病，适用于偏远农村地区。
ai_content.motivation: 传统显微镜诊断疟疾成本高、耗时且依赖人工，易出错；发展中国家缺乏专业人员，疟疾感染和死亡人数居高不下。

ai_content.conclusion: MAIScope为偏远地区提供自动化诊断方案，可扩展至其他疾病，有助于提升发展中国家疾病筛查的标准化与可及性。
